title: Chuyên viên Quản trị hệ thống bảo mật (Security Admin)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Ngân hàng TMCP hàng đầu
- Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng, minh bạch
- Cơ hội được đào tạo, phát triển kỹ năng chuyên sâu
jobDescription:
- Thực hiện công tác quản trị các hệ thống bảo mật, hệ thống giám sát, kiểm soát an ninh mạng; đảm bảo hệ thống hoạt động liên tục và an toàn.
- Nghiên cứu và triển khai các giải pháp kỹ thuật công nghệ nhằm đảm bảo an toàn thông tin, bảo mật dữ liệu, bảo mật hệ thống thông tin của Ngân hàng.
- Đầu mối tổ chức, phối hợp với các Đơn vị liên quan thu thập, tích hợp nhật ký an ninh mạng của các hệ thống thông tin vào hệ thống quản lý sự kiện an ninh mạng.
- Phối hợp các Đơn vị liên quan để thực hiện tích hợp các hệ thống bảo vệ vào hệ thống điều phối, tự động phản ứng trước các sự kiện, cảnh báo an ninh mạng.
- Làm việc giờ hành chánh + ngoài giờ theo yêu cầu phát sinh công việc.
requirements:
- Cấp chuyên viên: Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành về CNTT hoặc liên quan, có 2 năm kinh nghiệm.
- Trình độ ngoại ngữ: Tiếng Anh B1 (CEFR) hoặc tương đương
- Có kiến thức về hệ điều hành, mạng, TCP/IP, các hệ thống an ninh mạng, hệ thống phòng chống và phát hiện xâm nhập và các hệ thống liên quan đến an toàn thông tin.
- Có hiểu biết về các giải pháp,công nghệ, hệ thống: SIEM/SOAR, Vulnerability Scanning, WAF, DLP, PAM, DAM, Blockchain,...
- Hiểu biết kiến trúc bảo mật, các kỹ thuật bảo mật hệ thống, các kỹ thuật khai thác, tấn công và chống tấn công, nhận diện các kiểu tấn công và cách phòng chống.
- Có kinh nghiệm về phân tích, phối hợp ứng cứu sự cố an ninh mạng.
- Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng quy trình, kế hoạch, kịch bản xử lý sự kiện an ninh mạng, ứng phó sự cố an toàn thông tin.
- Có kiến thức, hiểu biết về các hoạt động tài chính ngân hàng.
- Có hiểu biết về các bộ tiêu chuẩn về an toàn thông tin.
- Có tìm hiểu về Trí tuệ nhân tạo (AI, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Big Data, ...).
- Chứng chỉ: Ưu tiên các chứng chỉ về quản trị hệ thống, bảo mật, an ninh mạng, kiểm thử an toàn bảo mật, điều tra số…(RHCE, RHCA, LPI-3, CCNP, CEH, OSCP, CTIA, ECSA, ECIH, CHFI, GDAT, GWAPT,CKA, CKS,...).
benefits:
CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ:

- Thời gian làm việc từ thứ 2 đến thứ 6
- Thưởng tháng 13, thưởng thành tích công việc, thưởng kết quả kinh doanh,….
- Thưởng vào các dịp Lễ, Tết, sinh nhật ngân hàng,…
- Tham gia bảo hiểm đầy đủ theo quy định.
- 12 ngày phép/năm và các chế độ nghỉ theo chính sách ngân hàng.
- Hỗ trợ chi phí gửi xe, chi phí đồng phục.
- Chế độ nghỉ mát hàng năm.
- Ưu đãi sử dụng sản phẩm, dịch vụ của ngân hàng: Miễn phí thường niên thẻ tín dụng, vay ưu đãi,…
- Khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm.

title: [HN] 02 Security Engineer / Kỹ sư bảo mật
company: Đầu Tư Và Phát Triển Hưng Phát (HPID)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Giới thiệu công ty

HPID là nhà phân phối các giải pháp công nghệ thông tin chuyên sâu về an ninh mạng (Cybersecurity) và bảo mật dữ liệu (Data Protection), đại diện phân phối các sản phẩm, giải pháp của Thales — tập đoàn công nghệ hàng đầu thế giới trong lĩnh vực bảo mật số (mã hóa dữ liệu, quản lý khóa, xác thực đa yếu tố, HSM…) cùng các hãng công nghệ đối tác khác trong hệ sinh thái bảo mật (WAF, IAM, DLP…).

Chúng tôi cung cấp giải pháp cho khách hàng doanh nghiệp, tổ chức tài chính - ngân hàng và cơ quan nhà nước tại Việt Nam

Vị trí: Security Engineer / Kỹ sư bảo mật

- Nơi làm việc : Thành phố Hà nội
- Số lượng tuyển : 01 tại Hà Nội
- Kinh nghiệm : Có kinh nghiệm kinh doanh dự án CNTT, đặc biệt ưu tiên các anh chị có kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực phân phối sản phẩm CNTT
- Tốt nghiệp: Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/ĐH, yêu thích kinh doanh
- Cấp bậc: Trưởng ban
- Mức lương : từ 25 triệu – 35 triệu
- Thưởng cuối năm : thưởng số theo kết quả hoàn thành công việc

Mô tả công việc

- Tư vấn kỹ thuật cho đội ngũ Sales trong quá trình tiếp cận và làm việc với khách hàng về các giải pháp bảo mật dữ liệu, mã hóa, quản lý khóa, xác thực (Thales CipherTrust, SafeNet, SAS PCE…) và các giải pháp liên quan (WAF, IAM…).
- Xây dựng và thực hiện demo, POC (Proof of Concept) sản phẩm cho khách hàng.
- Soạn thảo hồ sơ thầu: đặc tả kỹ thuật (technical specification), bảng so sánh đáp ứng yêu cầu, giải pháp đề xuất (solution proposal), dựa trên tài liệu chính hãng.
- Phối hợp với hãng (Thales và các đối tác công nghệ) để cập nhật thông tin sản phẩm, roadmap, tài liệu kỹ thuật.
- Tham gia khảo sát hiện trạng khách hàng, xây dựng phương án triển khai (deployment plan, checklist).
- Hỗ trợ đào tạo nội bộ, đào tạo khách hàng và đối tác về sản phẩm.
- Xây dựng tài liệu so sánh cạnh tranh (competitive analysis) giữa các giải pháp trên thị trường.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Cao Đẳng/Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Điện tử - Viễn thông hoặc tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm tối thiểu 1-2 năm ở vị trí Presale/Technical Consultant trong lĩnh vực CNTT (ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm về bảo mật, mạng, hạ tầng).
- Có kiến thức nền tảng về an ninh mạng: mã hóa dữ liệu, PKI, xác thực đa yếu tố (MFA), tường lửa ứng dụng web (WAF), quản lý danh tính (IAM) là lợi thế lớn.
- Khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh tốt.
- Kỹ năng viết tài liệu, trình bày, thuyết trình rõ ràng, mạch lạc.
- Chủ động, chịu được áp lực deadline (đặc biệt trong giai đoạn làm hồ sơ thầu).
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có chứng chỉ chuyên ngành: Security+, CCNA, CCNP hoặc chứng chỉ của các hãng bảo mật (Thales, Fortinet, Imperva…).
benefits:
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh: Lương cứng + thưởng theo hiệu quả công việc.
- Được đào tạo và cấp chứng chỉ chính hãng từ Thales và các đối tác công nghệ quốc tế.
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, tiếp cận công nghệ bảo mật mới nhất.
- Cơ hội làm việc trực tiếp với các dự án lớn trong ngành tài chính - ngân hàng, chính phủ.
- Chế độ BHXH, BHYT, phép năm theo quy định.
- Xét tăng lương định kỳ theo năng lực.

YÊU CẦU KHÁC:

- Hình thức: Nhân viên chính thức
- Thời gian thử việc: 2 tháng
- Thời gian làm việc: giờ hành chính từ thứ 2- thứ 6
- Cơ hội huấn luyện: được tham gia các khóa đào tạo về chuyên môn và kỹ năng mềm
- Đồng nghiệp: gần gũi, thân thiện
- Chế độ BHXH, BHYT, phép năm theo quy định.
- Phúc lợi:Chế độ nghỉ mát hèChi phí điện thoạiChi phí giao tế với khách hàngThưởng số khi hoàn thành mục tiêu
- Chế độ nghỉ mát hè
- Chi phí điện thoại
- Chi phí giao tế với khách hàng
- Thưởng số khi hoàn thành mục tiêu
- Ngày nghỉ: thứ 7, chủ nhật

title: Mid QA/QC Engineer (TypeScript/ JavaScript/ Postman)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Attractive salary + 13th salary
- Health checkup + health care package
- Opportunity to travel to the UK /Norway/Singapore.
jobDescription:
Seamless.insure is an end-to-end SaaS-based insurance management platform designed to empower underwriters and distributors with efficiency, compliance, and superior customer experiences. Our platform is adaptable, innovative, and crafted to address the complexities of theinsurance sector.

We are seeking a Quality Assurance Engineer to ensure the quality and reliability of our software products. You will be responsible for planning and executing test cases, identifying defects, and working closely with developers and stakeholders to deliver high-quality applications.

Key Responsibilities:

- Create test plans and contribute to defining acceptance criteria with Product/BA.
- Design, develop, and maintain automated test scripts using Playwright.
- Build and enhance automation testing frameworks for web applications.
- Create, execute, and maintain test cases for functional, regression, integration, and end-toend testing.
- Support integration of automated test suites into CI/CD pipelines in collaboration with DevOps
- Identify, document, track bugs to closure and perform root-cause analysis in collaboration with developers.
- Maintain and improve automated/manual test suites and assist in enhancing test processes.
- Follow and support compliance with Data Privacy and Security regulations during testing.
- Support or co-facilitate UAT sessions and ensure proper documentation and sign-off
- Analyze test results to identify root causes and suggest improvements when applicable.
- Provide clear test reports for major issues and actively participate in project meetings
- Follow and support security policies and compliance practices in testing activities
- Share knowledge with team members and contribute to documentation of testing practices.
- Explore and evaluate new testing tools and technologies, staying current with industry trends.
- Work independently on assigned testing tasks with minimal supervision, while seeking guidance when necessary
- Engage in self-study to continuously enhance your testing skills, supported by senior members
- Communicate with the development team to understand project requirements and acquire in-depth project knowledge.
- Actively participate in sprint activities (planning, grooming, retrospectives).
- Collaborate closely with the product team to ensure that user stories are well-defined and testable.
requirements:
Must-Have

- 3+ years of experience in software testing.
- At least 2 years of hands-on experience in API testing using Postman
- Strong experience with Playwright for web application testing.
- Proficiency in TypeScript or JavaScript
- Experience in designing and maintaining automation test framework using Playwright or Selenium
- Experienced in creating and executing functional and non-functional test cases
- Strong English communication and documentation skills.
- Strong attention to detail paired with logical & critical thinking
- Familiar with working in hybrid (Waterfall-Agile) SDLC, Scrum methodologies.

Nice-to-have

- ISTQB Foundation Level certification (or equivalent)
- Experienced in both Enterprise Web Applications and Mobile Applications testing methodologies.
- Experience leveraging AI tools (e.g., Copilot, ChatGPT, test generation tools) to enhance QA productivity
- Strong business acumen and knowledge in Insurance Applications will be added advantage
benefits:
- Be part of a global team driving innovation in the insurance sector.
- Work in a dynamic, fast-paced environment with opportunities for professional growth.
- Contribute to a platform that impacts thousands of users worldwide.
- Enjoy a supportive and collaborative workplace culture.

title: Unity Game Developer (C#)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
We are looking for a Unity Game Developer who enjoys building game systems and tools in a collaborative environment. You will be responsible for developing game content, core systems, and internal tools while continuously improving development efficiency and quality.

Responsibilities

- Develop game content using the Unity Engine (game systems, UI, and in-game features)
- Implement and maintain core game systems
- Develop internal tools to support game production and collaboration
- Extend Unity functionalities to improve development workflows
- Optimize performance and ensure stable builds
- Manage build environments and integrate external plugins
- Improve internal pipelines and development efficiency
- Support preparation and operation for live services
- Collaborate with designers, artists, and other developers
requirements:
Required Skills & Competencies

- Experience using the Unity Engine for game development
- Proficiency in C# programming
- Understanding of 2D / 3D programming concepts
- Basic knowledge of operating systems, memory, data structures, and algorithms
- Passion and dedication to game development
- Ability to read, write, and communicate in English
- Positive mindset and proactive communication skills
- Strong sense of responsibility for assigned tasks
- Logical thinking and creative problem-solving ability

Technical Skills

- Ability to design and implement game systems using Unity
- Experience developing Unity editor tools or production-support tools
- Understanding of performance optimization and profiling
- Experience managing build environments and plugin integration
- Understanding of multi-threaded programming concepts
benefits:
- Chance to work on global projects with multicultural teams, world-class games.
- Attractive salary and benefits.
- Professional work environment.
- Open culture where every employee is valued, treated fairly. and trusted.
- 13th salary every year at least 1-month salary.
- From 12 days Annual Leave
- Government social, health, and unemployment insurance.
- Lunch meals in office
- Annual salary review based on employee performance and company success
- Annual Company Trip, Year End Party
- Events during Birthday, Full Moon Festival, other important holidays

title: Business Analyst (Payment, Card)
company: NGÂN HÀNG THƯƠNG MẠI TNHH MTV KỶ NGUYÊN THỊNH VƯỢNG (GPBANK)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
- Define and manage product backlog for core banking modules.
- Prioritize backlog based on business value, risk, and system dependencies.
- Work closely with Developers, QA, and DevOps to ensure timely delivery and quality.
- Participate in Agile events (Sprint Planning, Review, Retrospective, etc.).
- Support development team in clarifying business logic and addressing issues.
- Communicate effectively with business units, testing teams, operations, and implementation partners.
- Monitor implementation process and evaluate post-release effectiveness.
requirements:

- Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery models, including sprint planning, backlog grooming, and daily stand-ups.
- Capable of translating business requirements into clear, structured user stories, acceptance criteria, and supporting documents.

- Proficient in using tools such as Jira, Confluence, Figma, Visio, or equivalent for documentation and collaboration.

benefits:

- Learning & Development: support for professional training courses and international certification exams.

- Health insurance & wellness: GPBankCare GOLD package (provided by Bao Viet Insurance) extended to employees and family members.
- Annual company trip and vacation allowance
- Holiday & special occasion bonuses (National holidays: Sept 2nd, Apr 30th, Hung Kings’ Festival, birthdays, weddings, birthday,etc.)

companyInfo.name: NGÂN HÀNG THƯƠNG MẠI TNHH MTV KỶ NGUYÊN THỊNH VƯỢNG (GPBANK)

title: Chief AI Transformation Officer-CAITO, Data Warehousing
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Quyền quyết định & impact ở quy mô lớn
- Bảo hiểm Chăm sóc sức khỏe CMC Care cao cấp
- Quy mô dự án lớn, ảnh hưởng toàn hệ sinh thái
jobDescription:
CMC TS đang xây dựng và phát triển năng lực AI-X (AI Transformation) nhằm cung cấp dịch vụ chuyển đổi AI toàn diện cho các khách hàng doanh nghiệp tại Việt Nam và khu vực.

Chúng tôi tìm kiếm một Chief AI Transformation Officer (CAITO) có tầm nhìn chiến lược, kinh nghiệm thực tiễn sâu rộng về Data & AI, năng lực lãnh đạo đội ngũ quy mô lớn và khả năng làm việc trực tiếp với lãnh đạo cấp cao của khách hàng.

CAITO sẽ là người chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng, phát triển và vận hành toàn bộ mảng kinh doanh AI Transformation của CMC TS, bao gồm tư vấn chiến lược AI, nền tảng dữ liệu, nền tảng AI, phát triển các AI use case, đào tạo, chuyển giao và vận hành tối ưu hệ thống AI cho khách hàng.

Đây là vị trí lãnh đạo cấp cao trong BOM, đóng vai trò xây dựng năng lực cốt lõi và tạo động lực tăng trưởng chiến lược cho công ty trong giai đoạn phát triển tiếp theo.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Xây dựng và dẫn dắt chiến lược AI Transformation

- Xây dựng chiến lược phát triển AI Transformation của CMC TS.
- Xây dựng danh mục giải pháp và dịch vụ AI-X.
- Định nghĩa phương pháp luận (Methodology) triển khai AI Transformation cho khách hàng doanh nghiệp.
- Xây dựng các framework đánh giá mức độ sẵn sàng về AI (AI Readiness Assessment).
- Tư vấn chiến lược AI cho khách hàng cấp C-Level.

2. Phát triển danh mục dịch vụ AI-X

Chịu trách nhiệm xây dựng và hoàn thiện các nhóm dịch vụ:

AI Strategy & Consulting

- AI Strategy
- AI Roadmap
- AI Governance
- Responsible AI
- AI Operating Model
- AI Center of Excellence (AI CoE)

Data Platform & Governance

- Data Strategy
- Data Governance
- Data Lake / Lakehouse
- Data Warehouse
- Master Data Management
- Data Quality Management

Enterprise AI Platform

- GenAI Platform
- Agentic AI Platform
- RAG Platform
- Knowledge Management Platform
- MLOps / LLMOps
- AI Monitoring & Governance

AI Applications & Use Cases  trong nhiều lĩnh vực khác nhau:

- Enterprise GPT
- AI Knowledge Assistant
- AI Customer Service
- AI Sales Assistant
- AI Financial Assistant
- AI Risk & Fraud Analytics
- Predictive Analytics
- Industry-specific AI Solutions

3. Thiết kế kiến trúc tổng thể sản phẩm

- Xây dựng kiến trúc tham chiếu (Reference Architecture) cho các ngành: Banking and Financial Services; Manufacturing ; Retail; Healthcare;Government …
- Định hướng công nghệ và kiến trúc AI (Cloud, Hybrid, Private) ; Các giải pháp về Sovereign AI ; kiến trúc Multi-Agent Systems ; Kiến trúc tich hợp hệ thống ; Enterprise Knowledge Graph ; AI Security

4. Lãnh đạo Delivery và đảm bảo chất lượng triển khai

- Thiết lập mô hình quản trị các dự án Data & AI.
- Xây dựng các tiêu chuẩn triển khai, vận hành và kiểm soát chất lượng.
- Tham gia định hướng các chương trình chuyển đổi AI chiến lược.
- Giám sát các dự án AI trọng điểm với vai trò Executive Sponsor hoặc Chief Architect.

5. Xây dựng và phát triển đội ngũ AI

- Xây dựng AI Practice của CMC TS.
- Tuyển dụng, dẫn dắt, đào tạo và tổ chức đội ngũ: AI Consultants , Data Consultants , AI Architects , Data Architects , Data Engineers , AI Engineers , MLOps Engineers …
- Thiết lập hệ thống năng lực, lộ trình nghề nghiệp và chương trình phát triển chuyên gia AI.

6. Hỗ trợ kinh doanh và phát triển thị trường

- Làm việc cùng Sales và Account Teams trong các cơ hội kinh doanh chiến lược.
- Tham gia xây dựng giải pháp, proposal và thuyết trình với cấp CEO, CIO, CDO, CTO.
- Đầu mối làm việc với các hãng, đối tác công nghệ toàn cầu trong lĩnh vực AI
- Tham gia các hội thảo, diễn đàn, sự kiện ngành trong và ngoài nước với vai trò diễn giả hoặc chuyên gia
requirements:
Education

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên chuyên ngành:Computer ScienceArtificial IntelligenceData ScienceInformation TechnologyEngineering
- Computer Science
- Artificial Intelligence
- Data Science
- Information Technology
- Engineering

Ưu tiên:

- Thạc sĩ hoặc Tiến sĩ.
- MBA hoặc các chương trình quản trị cấp cao.

Experience

Bắt buộc

- Tối thiểu 15 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực CNTT.

1. Nghiên cứu và đào tạo

- Tham gia xây dựng chiến lược quản lý dữ liệu, đảm bảo sự nhất quán, chất lượng và bảo vệ cần thiết để đáp ứng nhu cầu kinh doanh tổng thể.
- Tham gia xây dựng lộ trình triển khai quản trị dữ liệu bao gồm các ưu tiên chiến lược để phát triển các năng lực dựa trên thông tin

3. Quản trị dữ liệu: Tổ chức triển khai khung quản trị dữ liệu, tập trung vào việc cải thiện chất lượng dữ liệu và bảo vệ dữ liệu nhạy cảm thông qua các sửa đổi các chính sách và tiêu chuẩn hành vi của tổ chức, các nguyên tắc, chỉ số quản trị, các quy trình, dữ liệu và các công cụ liên quan

4. Xác định vai trò và trách nhiệm liên quan đến quản trị dữ liệu và đảm bảo trách nhiệm giải trình rõ ràng đối với việc quản lý các tài sản thông tin chính của công ty

5. Phát triển và quản lý bức tranh thông tin doanh nghiệp, bao gồm thẩm quyền và chủ sở hữu của các hệ thống

title: Senior Database Administrator (PostgreSQL, AWS, Agile)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Compelling Pay and Incentives
- Well-being & Work-life Balance
- Professional Development and Recognition
jobDescription:
Founded in 2016, Katalon is the category leader in AI-augmented software testing, empowering hybrid testers—those blending manual, automation, and AI skills—to deliver exceptional digital experiences. Katalon enables software teams of any size to deliver world-class customer experiences faster, easier, and more efficiently.

Since its first launch, Katalon has experienced tremendous growth, serving more than 30,000 teams across 80+ countries, many of which are in the Fortune Global 500. Katalon has been named a G2 Leader in software testing for 11 consecutive quarters and a Great Place to Work for three consecutive years.

About the role

As a Senior Database Engineer, you will own the database platform from architecture through operations, enabling product teams to build reliable, data-intensive applications and AI-powered capabilities. This role is ideal for engineers who are passionate about cloud-native infrastructure, database performance, automation, and modern data platforms.

Key Responsibilities

- Design, build, and operate Katalon's database platform with a focus on scalability, availability, security, and performance.
- Architect, provision, and manage PostgreSQL databases on AWS Aurora for mission-critical production systems.
- Build and maintain reusable database platform capabilities, including provisioning, backup & recovery, monitoring, observability, disaster recovery, and self-service tooling.
- Drive Infrastructure as Code (IaC) adoption to automate database provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle management.
- Optimize database performance through schema design, indexing strategies, query optimization, partitioning, replication, and capacity planning.
- Implement and maintain PostgreSQL Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), managing roles, grants, schema privileges, and least-privilege access across production and multi-tenant environments.
- Collaborate with Software Engineers and Platform teams to design scalable and reliable data architectures for SaaS products.
- Establish database standards, governance, security policies, backup strategies, and operational best practices across engineering teams.
- Troubleshoot complex production issues, perform root cause analysis, and implement long-term improvements to platform reliability.
- Lead database upgrades, migrations, and platform modernization initiatives with minimal service disruption.
requirements:
Job Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in Database Engineering, Database Administration, Platform Engineering, or Backend Engineering with strong database expertise.
- Strong hands-on experience with PostgreSQL, including replication, performance tuning, indexing, backup & recovery, partitioning, and high availability.
- Experience managing cloud-native database services, preferably AWS Aurora PostgreSQL and Amazon RDS.
- Strong SQL skills with the ability to optimize complex, high-volume production workloads.
- Experience implementing Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform or CloudFormation to provision and manage database infrastructure.
- Strong experience with PostgreSQL Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), including managing roles, grants, schema privileges, and applying least-privilege principles across production and multi-tenant environments.
- Solid understanding of Linux/Unix systems and cloud infrastructure.
- Experience working in modern CI/CD, DevOps, and Platform Engineering environments.
- Strong analytical thinking, troubleshooting, and system design skills.
- Good English communication skills, both written and verbal.
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or a related field is preferred, or equivalent practical experience.

Nice to Have

- Experience building automation tools and operational scripts using Python, Bash, or similar scripting languages.
- Experience with PostgreSQL extensions such as pgvector, PostGIS, or TimescaleDB.
- Experience with Kubernetes, Docker, and containerized environments.
- Experience with data warehousing technologies such as Amazon Redshift.
- AWS, PostgreSQL, Terraform, or Kubernetes certifications.
- Contributions to open-source projects or technical communities.
benefits:
At Katalon, we bring together self-starting, open-minded, and talented people while actively promoting a transparent and growth-enabling working environment. But don’t just take our word for it. Take a better look below!

- Total Remuneration: Satisfying your financial goals through competitive compensation and periodic performance bonuses.
- Well-being & Work-life Balance: Staying healthy through comprehensive health plans and generous paid leaves.
- Statutory Compliance: Labor compliance with local regulations that ensure employee security.
- Work Facilities & Accommodation: Top-notch equipment, supportive allowances, and A-class facilities.
- Diversity, Equity, Engagement, & Inclusion: Becoming part of a global team that celebrates differences, equal opportunity, and meaningful employee recognition.
- Growth & Rewards: Thriving professionally through employee enablement, a culture of trust, and rewarding performance.

Katalon is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. We care about our people and celebrate our differences. We want to work with talented, collaborative, and innovative people. We do not discriminate in hiring or any employment decision based on race, color, religion, national origin, age, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), marital status, ancestry, physical or mental disability, genetic information, veteran status, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, or other characteristics protected by law.

jobDescription:
Yêu cầu công việc

1. REQUIREMENTS ANALYSIS:

- Bridge the gap between business unit (BU) requirements and the to-be-developed system; collaborate with Enterprise Architects (EA) and vendors to design the target architecture for Collection systems, integration architecture, and data flow.
- Maintain the product backlog and organize sprints.
- Guide BUs in composing BRDs, defining business processes, and optimizing product logic.
- Work with selected vendors and Solution Architects (SA) to prepare FSDs/SRSs within the committed timeline.

2. DEVELOPMENT

- Collaborate with BU and Operations teams to build system operation procedures and define SLAs.
- Support PDs, PMs, IT PMs, and SAs with project execution activities.
- Participate in assigned projects, ensuring timely and high-quality delivery of assigned tasks.

3. MONITOR & EVALUATE

- Manage changes during BAU phase from initiation to implementation (act as mini PM for change requests).
- Monitor and assess system readiness and adaptability to new or changing business requirements.

4. IMPROVE

- Research new banking products and processes, focusing on specific domains like Finance services, Collection, etc...
- Analyze and propose feasible solutions to meet business requirements, including effort estimation.
- Clarify business processes and rules; identify automation opportunities and make rules understandable for developers.

5. TRAIN & SUPPORT

- Provide consultation and support to end-users and BUs for issues or inquiries related to implemented business processes.

title: Lead Penetration Tester (Pentester)
label: SUPER HOT
reasons:
- Flexible working time
- Latest Technology Updates
- Competitive salary package
jobDescription:
ITviec's client is an AI-centric global digital transformation company. We design advanced data and AI transformation solutions, modernize technology architectures and develop next-generation core systems for industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Manufacturing and Robotics. Partnering closely with our clients, we push boundaries to unlock their full potential.

As a Lead Penetration Tester, you will be responsible for leading and performing authorized security testing activities across applications, digital platforms, APIs, infrastructure, cloud environments, and related systems. This role is designed as a hands-on technical leadership position, with approximately 70% focus on penetration testing execution and 30% focus on leading, guiding, reviewing, and coordinating security testing activities.

The role focuses on identifying security vulnerabilities, validating risks, supporting remediation, and ensuring that systems meet security, regulatory, and industry requirements. You will be expected to act as a senior technical expert, providing direction on testing approach, reviewing findings, mentoring team members, and ensuring high-quality penetration testing deliverables.

You will work closely with security teams, application teams, infrastructure teams, DevOps, architects, business stakeholders, and compliance teams to plan and perform penetration testing across web, mobile, API, cloud, and network environments. The role requires strong hands-on technical security skills, practical experience in ethical hacking, and the ability to communicate security risks clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

This role requires the candidate to work onsite at the client’s office based on project needs and client requirements. The onsite frequency, working schedule, location, and duration will be aligned with the client’s expectations and may vary depending on the project phase, testing activities, stakeholder meetings, security assessment timeline, and remediation support needs.

Key Activities

Hands-on Penetration Testing

- Perform authorized penetration testing for web applications, mobile applications, APIs, infrastructure, cloud environments, and digital platforms.
- Identify, validate, exploit where appropriate, and document security vulnerabilities, including authentication, authorization, session management, input validation, encryption, access control, and business logic issues.
- Conduct security assessments based on industry standards such as OWASP Top 10, OWASP API Security Top 10, OWASP Mobile Security Testing Guide, and relevant security practices.
- Analyze application flows, user journeys, transaction processes, access controls, and data handling mechanisms to identify potential security risks.
- Perform vulnerability assessment and manual verification to reduce false positives and confirm actual exploitability in authorized environments.
- Conduct retesting activities to validate remediation effectiveness and ensure vulnerabilities are properly resolved.
- Support security testing activities within the SDLC, including security requirement review, threat analysis, test planning, and release security validation.
- Stay updated with emerging cyber threats, attack techniques, security risks, and security testing best practices.

Technical Leadership & Delivery Support

- Lead the planning, scoping, and execution of penetration testing activities across assigned projects or workstreams.
- Define penetration testing approach, test strategy, testing scope, priorities, timelines, and required evidence based on project and client requirements.
- Guide and mentor penetration testers or security engineers in testing methodology, vulnerability validation, reporting quality, and remediation discussions.
- Review vulnerability findings, risk ratings, evidence, and remediation recommendations to ensure accuracy, consistency, and practical value.
- Act as the main technical point of contact for penetration testing activities, working with client stakeholders, security teams, development teams, DevOps, infrastructure teams, and compliance teams.
- Facilitate vulnerability walkthroughs, risk clarification sessions, remediation discussions, and retesting alignment with relevant stakeholders.
- Support estimation, planning, status tracking, issue escalation, and delivery reporting for security testing activities.
- Contribute to improving security testing processes, reporting templates, testing checklists, knowledge sharing, and reusable testing practices.
- Support regulatory, audit, and compliance requirements by providing security testing evidence, reports, remediation status, and technical clarification when needed.
requirements:
Required Skills

- Strong hands-on experience in penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, ethical hacking, and security testing across application, API, mobile, network, and cloud environments.
- Proven experience leading or coordinating penetration testing activities, including test planning, execution tracking, finding review, stakeholder communication, and retesting coordination.
- Strong knowledge of web and API security vulnerabilities, including OWASP Top 10, API authentication, authorization, token handling, insecure direct object references, injection, broken access control, and business logic flaws.
- Experience testing iOS and Android applications, including mobile application security controls, local storage, certificate pinning, authentication, session handling, and secure communication.
- Experience in assessing network services, servers, operating systems, misconfigurations, access controls, and common infrastructure vulnerabilities.
- Familiarity with cloud security concepts and security testing considerations for AWS, Azure, or GCP environments.
- Hands-on experience with tools such as Burp Suite, OWASP ZAP, Nmap, Nessus, Metasploit, Wireshark, Postman, MobSF, or equivalent security testing tools.
- Ability to independently validate vulnerabilities, assess exploitability, determine business impact, and provide clear remediation recommendations.
- Ability to write and review clear security reports, including vulnerability details, risk ratings, technical evidence, business impact, and remediation guidance.
- Ability to explain technical findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders in a clear, structured, and practical manner.
- Ability to work with engineering teams to clarify root causes, support fix implementation, and perform retesting.
- Good understanding of secure coding principles, data privacy, encryption, identity and access management, and common security frameworks.
- Understanding of security requirements in regulated, audit, or compliance-driven environments.
- Strong problem-solving skills, ownership mindset, attention to detail, and ability to manage multiple testing activities in parallel.
- Excellent English communication skills are required, with the ability to communicate fluently and confidently with client stakeholders, security teams, business users, and technical teams.

Nice-to-have Requirements

- Prior experience working on penetration testing or security assessment projects for banks, fintechs, payment platforms, card systems, or financial institutions.
- Good understanding of banking systems, digital banking, payments, cards, customer onboarding, AML/KYC, fraud management, account services, and transaction flows.
- Familiarity with banking security practices and financial industry security requirements.
- Familiarity with PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, SWIFT Customer Security Controls Framework, local banking regulations, or other financial industry security requirements.
- Experience conducting secure code review or working with SAST tools to identify security issues in application code.
- Experience integrating security testing into CI/CD pipelines and working with tools such as SAST, DAST, SCA, container scanning, or secrets detection.
- Familiarity with cloud misconfiguration assessment, container security, Kubernetes security, Docker security, and infrastructure-as-code security checks.
- Experience with controlled red team exercises, attack simulation, phishing simulation, or adversary emulation in authorized environments.
- Ability to use Python, Bash, PowerShell, or similar scripting languages to automate testing, validation, or reporting tasks.
- Experience building security testing methodology, playbooks, checklists, report templates, or quality review practices.
- Experience mentoring junior or mid-level penetration testers and supporting capability development within a security testing team.
- Relevant certifications such as CEH, eJPT, PNPT, OSCP, GWAPT, GPEN, CISSP, CISM, or equivalent are preferred.
benefits:

- Continuous Growth & Learning: Accelerate your career with official technical certifications, global mobility opportunities, and structured training programs tailored to your career path.
- Premium Benefits Package: Enjoy a highly competitive salary, premium private healthcare insurance, performance-based bonuses, and a modern hybrid working model that keeps you flexible and creative.

title: Junior Backend Developer (Wordpress / PHP)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Entry-level developer who supports the Middle Fullstack Developer on the production WordPress plugin that powers live Quality Realty tenants today. You implement small features, bug fixes, and tests in PHP and wp-admin JavaScript, and help integrate admin-side changes (including CCI-related UI hooks) under close review. This is a transition role: the long-term web stack is React/Next.js; you strengthen the legacy runway, not the final platform choice.

Current engineering phaseRevenue and operations depend on the WordPress plugin and REST API /wp-json/qr/v3. New Python/FastAPI services are added alongside using a strangler-fig approach. You work mainly in PHP/MySQL and admin UI; you do not own mobile (Flutter) or the future Next.js admin app.

About Quality Realty (QR)

Quality Realty is an early-stage AI-native SaaS startup building the future of real estate transactions in the Netherlands. We are developing Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) — a voice-first, multilingual platform that connects realtors, clients, and service vendors (painters, movers, stagers, energy auditors, etc.) throughout the entire home buying, selling, and rental process.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully re-sellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Fix bugs from the backlog: reproduce issues, patch PHP/plugin code, verify on staging where available.
- Implement small, scoped features in the WordPress plugin (PHP) and wp-admin front-end (JavaScript/jQuery patterns used in the codebase) under Middle Fullstack review.
- Write and improve unit tests and simple integration checks for code you touch.
- Respect multi-tenant patterns (organization_id, roles/capabilities); never break cross-tenant isolation.
- Follow additive-only database and API changes unless explicitly approved; protect /wp-json/qr/v3 backward compatibility.
- Assist with CCI admin integration tasks (screens, hooks, REST wiring) as specified by the Tech Lead.
- Support retargeting, widget orders, AI Flow / prompt UI tasks when prioritized by BA and Tech Lead.
- Participate in code reviews, Git pull requests, and team standards; learn WordPress and plugin architecture from Middle and Tech Lead.
- Document what you change (short PR descriptions, handover notes) so future Next.js migration is easier.
- Do not own Python services, Flutter mobile, or greenfield architecture decisions
requirements:
- 1–2 years professional or strong internship experience in PHP development (personal projects acceptable if quality is demonstrated).
- Basic WordPress familiarity: hooks, plugins, admin screens, or willingness to learn quickly on a large codebase.
- Basic JavaScript for admin UI adjustments.
- SQL basics (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE; simple joins).
- Git: branches, pull requests, readable commits.
- Good English for team chat, PR descriptions, and reading specs.
- Strong willingness to learn, accept feedback, and work in a small team.

Nice to have

- Exposure to REST APIs (consuming or extending).
- Basic Python (helps communication with Junior Backend track).
- Awareness of Sentry, logging, or debugging production issues.
- Interest in real estate or marketplace products.
- Prior WordPress plugin (not only theme) experience.
benefits:

jobDescription:
Tầm nhìn Vai trò

One Mount là hệ sinh thái công nghệ dẫn đầu tại Việt Nam, tiên phong kiến tạo các nền tảng số đột phá trong các lĩnh vực bán lẻ, phân phối, bất động sản và tài chính (OneU, OneShop, OneHousing). Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm nhân tài cho vị trí Expert Information Security để trực tiếp dẫn dắt chiến lược bảo mật sản phẩm và hạ tầng Cloud ở quy mô lớn. Vai trò này đòi hỏi sự kết hợp giữa tư duy kiến trúc hệ thống, năng lực kỹ thuật chuyên sâu và khả năng đồng kiến tạo (co-create) cùng các đội ngũ Phát triển Sản phẩm (Engineering/Product) nhằm thực thi nguyên tắc Security-by-Design trong toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển.

I: Trách nhiệm & Phạm vi Ảnh hưởng

1. Kiến trúc An ninh Sản phẩm (Product Security & Architecture)

- Chủ trì thực hiện Security Architecture Review và Threat Modeling cho các hệ thống và dịch vụ trọng yếu của hệ sinh thái.
- Định hình các phương án thiết kế bảo mật tối ưu, đảm bảo sự cân bằng giữa tính an toàn, trải nghiệm người dùng và tốc độ vận hành kinh doanh.
- Trực tiếp đánh giá chuyên sâu an ninh ứng dụng (API, Mobile, Web, Backend) và các nền tảng Platform cốt lõi.

2. Vận hành An ninh Ứng dụng & DevSecOps

- Thiết lập và chuẩn hoá khung làm việc Secure SDLC / DevSecOps trên quy mô toàn tập đoàn.
- Tự động hoá quy trình kiểm soát an ninh (SAST, DAST, SCA, IaC Scanning, SBOM) vào hệ thống CI/CD.
- Điều phối các hoạt động rà soát mã nguồn (Secure Code Review), Pentest.
- Quản trị rủi ro và ưu tiên xử lý lỗ hổng dựa trên phân tích tác động thực tế tới doanh nghiệp.

3. An ninh Hạ tầng Cloud & Platform

- Thiết kế và rà soát các chốt chặn an ninh trên Cloud (GCP/AWS), hướng tới quản trị Multi-cloud bền vững.
- Tư vấn triển khai chuyên sâu về IAM Hardening, Network Security, Workload Isolation và Data Protection.
- Đảm bảo an ninh cho môi trường Kubernetes, Container Platform và hạ tầng mã hoá (IaC).

4. Quản trị Rủi ro, Tuân thủ & Công nghệ Mới

- Đảm bảo an ninh dữ liệu và tuân thủ các tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (PCI DSS, ISO 27001, NIST, SOC 2).
- Nghiên cứu và đánh giá rủi ro cho các công nghệ tiên phong: AI/ML Security, Blockchain, Automation.
- Dẫn dắt các hoạt động Security Research, chia sẻ tri thức và xây dựng cộng đồng bảo mật nội bộ.

5. Dẫn dắt & Phát triển Năng lực (Leadership & Enablement)

- Cố vấn (Mentor) và phát triển chuyên môn cho các thành viên trong đội ngũ Security.
- Xây dựng hệ thống Playbook, Security Patterns và hướng dẫn lập trình an toàn (Secure Coding Practices).
- Thúc đẩy văn hoá an ninh thông tin xuyên suốt các đơn vị kinh doanh và khối kỹ thuật.
requirements:

1: Tiêu chuẩn Bắt buộc (Must-have)

- Tối thiểu 6 năm kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu trong lĩnh vực Security Engineering / Product Security / Cloud Security.

title: Junior Flutter Developer (iOS & Android — Mobile Only)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Entry-level Flutter developer who will help build and maintain the native mobile applications (Android & iOS) for the Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) and its underlying AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP). You will work under close guidance from the Tech Lead and the Middle Fullstack Developer, implementing mobile features, integrating APIs, and learning best practices in a fast-moving startup environment.

Important: Admin and marketplace web are built in React/Next.js, not Flutter Web. Third-party embeds use our existing qr-widget.js. This role is mobile-only.

Current engineering phaseProduction today runs on a WordPress plugin with REST /wp-json/qr/v3. New Python/FastAPI services (CCI, voice, ML) are added alongside. Your app will consume these APIs; you do not maintain the WordPress plugin.

About Quality Realty (QR)

Quality Realty is an early-stage AI-native SaaS startup building the future of real estate transactions in the Netherlands. We are developing Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) — a voice-first, multilingual platform that connects realtors, clients, and service vendors (painters, movers, stagers, energy auditors, etc.) throughout the entire home buying, selling, and rental process.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully re-sellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Implement mobile UI screens, components, and layouts in Flutter according to Figma designs and specifications from the UX designer and Tech Lead.
- Integrate REST APIs (/wp-json/qr/v3 during transition, and /api/v1/* for new Python services): authentication, tenant context, CRM actions, vendor matching, valuations, and related marketplace features.
- Integrate WebSocket / real-time flows for Grok voice sessions (and chat/text fallback where designed) in coordination with the backend team — mobile client only.
- Handle state management (Riverpod or Bloc preferred), form validation, navigation, and error handling on iOS and Android.
- Support Dutch and English UI strings and locale switching as specified by product.
- Write unit and widget tests; fix bugs identified during QA or code reviews.
- Participate actively in code reviews, follow team coding standards, and learn modern Flutter patterns.
- Collaborate with the UX designer for mobile voice-to-visual flows and accessible, usable screens.
- Assist in preparing and testing app builds for Google Play internal tracks and TestFlight betas (iOS).
- Do not own admin web portal or Flutter Web production deployments — those are out of scope for this role.
requirements:
- 1–2 years of professional software development experience (internships, freelance projects, or strong personal/open-source work are fully acceptable).
- Solid understanding of Dart and Flutter for iOS and Android (widgets, layouts, navigation, state management, animations).
- Basic knowledge of REST APIs, JSON handling, and HTTP clients (e.g. dio or http package).
- Basic understanding of authentication flows (tokens, secure storage on device).
- Familiarity with Git (branching, pull requests, commit messages) and collaborative development workflows.
- Strong willingness to learn quickly, accept constructive feedback, and thrive in a small, supportive team.
- Good English communication skills (written & spoken) for team discussions and documentation.

Nice to have

- Experience building and deploying Flutter apps to Google Play or App Store (TestFlight).
- Exposure to real-time features (WebSockets, LiveKit, or similar) or voice/chat integrations.
- Basic understanding of UI/UX, accessibility basics, and mobile performance.
- Familiarity with Riverpod, Bloc, or Provider.
- Interest in AI-powered applications or voice interfaces.
- Basic awareness of Python/FastAPI backends (you integrate via API, you do not build the server).
benefits:
- Opportunity to work on a modern, voice-first, AI-native marketplace mobile app as the product matures.
- Direct mentorship from the Tech Lead and Middle Fullstack Developer.
- Chance to grow into mid-level mobile responsibilities as QR scales.
- Remote-friendly environment with flexible hours (HCMC-based team).
- Competitive salary for junior level in Vietnam + performance bonuses (details with Tech Lead / CTO).
- Exposure to real-world startup challenges and end-to-end product development.
- Part-time ~20 hours/week; planned wave 4 (from September 2026) — after core APIs and voice foundation are in place. Start date may adjust slightly based on hiring.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully resellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Collect, explore, clean, and preprocess data from Dutch sources (CBS, Kadaster, BAG, PDOK, ECB/OECD macros, and realtor Excel uploads) to build robust training and validation datasets. Funda/Pararius ingestion only where legally approved (may be deferred for MVP).
- Perform feature engineering, including geospatial work (e.g. geopy/geopandas), temporal lags, economic adjustments (interest rates, inflation), and Dutch-specific factors (energy labels, postcode granularity, house age, WOZ influence).
- Design, train, and iterate on ML models for property valuation (XGBoost, Random Forest, LightGBM) and, where scoped, time-series forecasting (LSTM, Prophet, or hybrid approaches) targeting MAPE < 6–8% on hold-out and realistic test sets.
- Benchmark against the existing Altum integration so we can switch or A/B without regressing tenant-facing quality.
- Conduct rigorous evaluation: cross-validation, backtesting against historical Dutch market shifts, and monitoring for concept drift (e.g. post-2022 rate changes, energy transition).
- Apply explainability (SHAP, LIME) so product and voice flows can surface understandable drivers (e.g. location, energy label contributions).
- Integrate models into the Python backend (FastAPI) for batch and real-time inference, working with the Middle Fullstack Developer and Junior Backend Developer on reliable, low-latency serving.
- Automate retraining pipelines (Cloud Composer / Airflow) and contribute to the ETL layer so models receive fresh data.
- Analyze errors, market trends, and feedback; propose improvements (e.g. renovation scenarios, risk flags, personalized insights).
- Document models, experiments, feature importance, and data usage for GDPR, internal knowledge sharing, and future white-label use.
- Partner with the Tech Lead on model selection, architecture, and scalability; support data-science best practices across the team as it grows.
requirements:
Required skills & experience

- 2–4 years professional experience as a Data Scientist or ML Engineer with at least one model used in production or serious pilot; 3+ years welcome for stronger candidates.
- Strong Python for data science (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, XGBoost/LightGBM; TensorFlow/PyTorch or statsmodels as needed).
- Solid experience with regression and preferably time-series forecasting; geospatial skills (geopandas, geopy) a significant plus.
- Proven ability to clean and merge large, messy datasets, handle outliers, and engineer features that improve accuracy.
- Practical knowledge of MAPE, RMSE, MAE, hyperparameter tuning (Optuna, GridSearch), cross-validation, and explainable AI (SHAP, LIME).
- Comfortable with SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL) and Git.
- Strong analytical mindset; ability to translate real estate and business problems into data-driven solutions.
- Eagerness to work in a small startup, iterate quickly, and take ownership of outcomes.
- Good English for documentation and collaboration with the CTO and Tech Lead.

Nice to have

- Dutch real estate domain knowledge (energy labels, WOZ, regional trends, post-2020 market shifts).
- Experience deploying ML (Docker, FastAPI, Cloud Run, drift monitoring).
- Airflow / Cloud Composer or data quality tools (Great Expectations).
- MLflow or similar experiment tracking.
- Multimodal or LLM-enhanced features (images, RAG) — if scoped later.
- Dutch language for reading source documentation.
benefits:
What we offer

- Opportunity to shape the valuation intelligence of a modern, voice-first real estate marketplace with real user impact.
- Direct collaboration with the Tech Lead and CTO on AI strategy for QR and future ANMP resellers.
- Path to expanded responsibility as the platform and data mature.
- Remote-friendly environment with flexible hours (HCMC-based core team).
- Competitive compensation for Vietnam market + performance bonuses (level aligned with part-time scope; details with Tech Lead / CTO).
- Hands-on work with XGBoost, Dutch open data, GCP, and production integration challenges.
- Part-time ~20 hours/week; preferred start July 2026 (wave 4 in hiring plan — may adjust slightly by hire date). Heavy ETL/ML production peaks September–November 2026 in the current roadmap.

Reporting line

This role reports to the Tech Lead and works closely with the Middle Fullstack Developer (WordPress + Python), Junior Backend Developer, BA, and UX Designer to ensure models are production-ready, explainable, and compliant with product messaging (e.g. “AI estimate — not an official appraisal” until legal/product sign-off).

What you'll be doing

Embedded directly in a cross-functional product team, you'll work shoulder-to-shoulder with developers and product owners to build quality in from the start. That means:

- Designing, developing, and maintaining automated test solutions across unit, integration, and end-to-end levels

- Helping establish and evolve quality practices across the team — and sharing what works with the wider engineering organization
requirements:

- Genuine enthusiasm for AI-assisted development tools — not just openness, but curiosity and initiative in applying them
- Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams
- Cyber security domain knowledge is a bonus, not a requirement
- Clear written and spoken English
- A collaborative, humble attitude and a habit of continuous learning
benefits:

- A front-row position in our AI-first development transformation, with tooling, practices, and peers invested in doing it well
- Skilled, experienced colleagues across an international environment
- A culture where your ideas are heard and acted on

And

- An opportunity to work with experienced software engineers worldwide at market leading, innovative Scandinavian SaaS company looking to accelerate growth.

- A Scandinavian work culture that emphasizes creativity, innovation, and work-life balance.

requirements:

title: Senior Manager, Business Ownership (Product & Growth)
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
MoMo is looking for a business owner who can take a product vertical and run it end-to-end — strategy, product, and growth — not just manage a workstream inside it. You build and ship the product, and you own the metrics that prove it's working.

This is structured as a track toward full business ownership: managers who deliver against the product and growth mandate progress toward owning a wider vertical or business unit, with P&L-level scope and visibility.

We're not looking for someone to run a single function well. We're looking for someone who can be hands-on in product and rigorous enough to own a number.

Key Responsibilities:

Business Ownership

- Own the vertical's growth and business targets (e.g. MAU, GMV, revenue, or other core metrics).
- Take end-to-end accountability for outcomes — not just delivery of tasks or features.

Product Leadership

- Define and own the product roadmap for the vertical, aligned to business goals and user needs.
- Drive product discovery, feature prioritization based on user research, data, and competitive insight.
- Stay hands-on through the build cycle — working with Product from spec to launch, not handing off after requirements.

Growth & Performance

- Define the KPIs that matter, diagnose funnel or performance issues, and design experiments (A/B testing, cohort analysis) to improve activation, retention, or conversion.
- Use data and analytics to make growth levers (incentives, product changes, channel mix) work together rather than in isolation.

Cross-functional & Team Leadership

- Build and develop a team, with clear growth paths for each member.
- Lead and influence stakeholders across Tech, Risk, Legal, Marketing, Finance, and other functions — through influence, not just reporting lines.
- Represent the business in cross-functional and leadership-level working groups.
requirements:
Must have

- 8+ years of experience in Product, Growth, or a Business/GM role within a complex, cross-functional environment.
- Direct ownership of at least one business or product metric (e.g. activation, retention, GMV, revenue), with concrete, presentable results — ideally including P&L or P&L-adjacent ownership.
- Experience in fintech, payments, e-commerce, or platform/marketplace businesses.
- Exposure to data-driven growth techniques (segmentation, experimentation, A/B testing at scale).

What Makes This Role Different:

Most product roles optimize a roadmap. Most growth roles optimize a funnel. This role is for someone who doesn't want to pick one — who can be hands-on in shipping product and still be the person who owns whether the number moves, and who's ultimately measured on the health of the business, not just the workstream.
benefits:
We are passion with new technologies, not follow the old-track of outsourcing. We love our product and ready to sacrifice everything for it! You often argue with your boss? Don’t worry, here in M_Service, you will get salary increase if you win your boss in argument. We love objection!!! You hate company trip in hotel, resort? We only conquer difficult and hottest road in team building. Do you want to join?

What you will get:

- Competitive compensation package.
- Performance-based bonus.
- Insurance package.
- Chance to work with smart people with international experience.

Our benefits:

- Attractive compensation & benefits.
- 13th month salary bonus and yearly performance bonus.
- 16 paid days off per year + 1 paid birthday leave
- Premium health care insurance
- Great allowances (lunch, parking, birthday, happy hours....)
- Salary review at least one time per year based on employee's performance and contribution.
- Outing/team-building activities (company trip , soccer sport, english club, running club,..).

title: Backend Engineer (Grok Voice Agent)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Role summary

Senior-leaning backend engineer who owns the real-time voice layer behind the Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) and its re-sellable AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP). You build and operate the Grok Voice Agent integration — the WebSocket proxy, the tool-calling framework that lets our agent "Q" execute real platform actions (valuations, CRM, vendor matching, workflow state changes, payments), and the text/chat fallback. This is the single most central engineering role in our AI-native vision: voice is the primary interface, not a feature.

You work closely with the Tech Lead and the Middle Fullstack Developer, and you set the patterns the Junior Backend Developer and Junior Flutter Developer follow when they consume your APIs.

Current engineering phase (May–July 2026)

Production today runs on a WordPress plugin with REST /wp-json/qr/v3 and paying Dutch realtor tenants. New Python/FastAPI services are added alongside using a strangler-fig approach — no big-bang rewrite. The voice track is net-new: you build the FastAPI voice proxy and tool endpoints from the ground up, while respecting the existing API contracts and multi-tenant model (organization_id, roles/capabilities). Web clients use React/Next.js; mobile uses Flutter (LiveKit on the device) — both consume your real-time layer via APIs.

About Quality Realty (QR)

Quality Realty is an early-stage AI-native SaaS startup building the future of real estate transactions in the Netherlands. We are developing Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM). This voice-first, multilingual platform connects realtors, clients, and service vendors (painters, movers, stagers, energy auditors, etc.) throughout the entire home buying, selling, and rental process.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully re-sellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Build and maintain the Grok Voice Agent WebSocket proxy in Python/FastAPI: low-latency, streaming, reconnect-safe, with LiveKit integration points for the Flutter mobile client.
- Design a clean, versioned "tools" API that the voice agent can call to execute real actions — CRM operations, vendor matching, property valuations, workflow/order state changes, and payment flows — with strict input validation and per-tenant authorization on every call.
- Implement authentication and session management for voice sessions: JWT-based auth middleware, tenant context propagation (organization_id, roles), session lifecycle, and a robust text/chat fallback for when voice is unavailable.
- Productionize the first 8–10 core voice commands mapping to real realtor actions, end-to-end (intent → tool call → backend mutation → spoken/visual confirmation).
- Integrate external AI/LLM and real-time services (Grok primary; Anthropic/OpenAI where relevant) and coordinate with the Middle Fullstack Developer on WP-side tool endpoints during transition.
- Handle observability and reliability: structured logging, tracing on the streaming path, error handling, idempotency, and graceful degradation (Cloud Logging, Sentry).
- Write OpenAPI specs, tool-function docs, and developer handoff notes so the Junior Backend, Junior Flutter, and Next.js engineers can consume and extend the voice layer safely.
- Enforce security and privacy on the voice path: no PII in logs/metadata where avoidable, GDPR-aware transcript handling, access control on sensitive tools (payments, payouts).
- Participate in code reviews, follow team standards (ruff/black, mypy, pre-commit where adopted), and partner with the Tech Lead on architecture and scalability
requirements:
Required skills & experience

- 3–5 years of backend engineering, with proven delivery of production services.
- Strong Python (FastAPI preferred; async/await, packaging, testing) — required.
- Hands-on real-time systems experience: WebSockets, streaming, low-latency APIs, connection lifecycle, and backpressure handling.
- Experience integrating AI/LLM APIs (Grok, Anthropic, OpenAI) or voice platforms (LiveKit, Twilio, Vonage, or similar).
- Solid understanding of authentication and session state (JWT/OAuth, secure token handling) and cloud deployment concepts (containers, serverless; GCP a plus).
- Comfortable designing and documenting JSON/REST APIs and OpenAPI specs.
- Working knowledge of relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred) and safe schema/migration practices under supervision of the Tech Lead.
- Good English communication (written and spoken) for documentation, team discussions, and collaboration with the Dutch CTO and Tech Lead.

Nice to have

- Experience building tool-calling / function-calling frameworks for LLM agents.
- Familiarity with LiveKit, WebRTC, or audio streaming pipelines.
- Exposure to multi-tenant SaaS (tenant isolation, RLS, configurable rules).
- Stripe Connect / payments integration awareness (you may expose payment tools to the agent).
- Experience with Google Cloud (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub) or similar.
- CI/CD (GitHub Actions / GitLab CI), Docker, monitoring (Sentry).
- Interest in voice UX, multilingual systems (Dutch & English), or real estate / proptech.
- Basic awareness of WordPress REST or PHP (you do not own the plugin, but you align with its API contracts during transition).
benefits:
What we offer

- Ownership of the defining technical differentiator of the platform — the voice-first layer real Dutch realtors use daily.
- Direct collaboration with the Tech Lead and CTO; high autonomy and influence over the AI architecture for QR and future ANMP resellers.
- Clear path to voice/AI lead responsibility as QR scales and the platform is licensed to white-label partners.
- Hybrid environment with flexible hours (HCMC-based core team; sync windows with Europe).
- Competitive full-time salary for a senior/mid-senior level in Vietnam + performance bonuses (details with CTO).
- Hands-on work with Grok Voice Agent, FastAPI, real-time streaming, GCP, and real-world marketplace problems during a live production transition.
- Full-time; Wave 2 hire (from July 2026) — joining as the voice foundation is established, ahead of the broader team ramp.

Reporting line

This role reports to the Tech Lead with a close working relationship to the CTO on AI/voice strategy. Works closely with the Middle Fullstack Developer (WordPress + Python) (WP-side tool endpoints), the Junior Backend Developer (Python services), the Junior Flutter Developer (mobile LiveKit client), the Data Scientist (valuation tools exposed to "Q"), and the UX Designer (voice-to-visual flows). The Next.js web track consumes the same APIs.

title: Middle Fullstack Developer (WordPress, Python)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Role summary

Mid-level engineer who owns the production WordPress plugin and new Python services during handover from the outgoing builder. You keep /wp-json/qr/v3 stable for live Dutch realtor tenants, deliver FastAPI work (CCI, integrations, gateway), and mentor junior developers. This is a transition role on our path to React/Next.js (web), Flutter (mobile only), and Python/FastAPI — not a greenfield Flutter rebuild and not “WordPress forever.”

Current engineering phaseLive revenue runs on the WordPress plugin and embeds qr-widget.js. We use a strangler-fig approach: no big-bang rewrite; APIs stay backward-compatible while we add Python services and, later, Next.js and Flutter mobile clients.

About Quality Realty (QR)

Quality Realty is an early-stage AI-native SaaS startup building the future of real estate transactions in the Netherlands. We are developing Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM). This voice-first, multilingual platform connects realtors, clients, and service vendors (painters, movers, stagers, energy auditors, etc.) throughout the entire home buying, selling, and rental process.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully resellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Own day-to-day engineering on the production WordPress plugin (PHP): bug fixes, security hardening, PII/tenant isolation, retargeting, widget orders, Stripe groundwork, and AI Flow/admin improvements — with additive-only schema and API changes so live tenants do not break.
- Maintain and extend the versioned REST API /wp-json/qr/v3; enforce semantic versioning and deprecation discipline for existing integrations.
- Build and maintain Python services with FastAPI (e.g. Contract Intelligence / CCI, API gateway routes, webhooks): clean models, auth, error handling, tests, and documentation under Tech Lead architecture.
- Integrate external services from both stacks where appropriate: Anthropic (Claude) for AI flows, Stripe Connect, Altum (valuations), calendar/email patterns, and preparation for Grok Voice Agent (WebSocket proxying and tool endpoints — primarily Python track; you support integration and WP-side tools).
- Implement and respect multi-tenant isolation on WordPress (organization_id, roles/capabilities) and on new Python/PostgreSQL work (tenant context, RLS on Cloud SQL where applicable).
- Contribute to database and migration work: MySQL (plugin) with safe migrations; PostgreSQL on Cloud SQL for new services (Alembic/migrations under review).
- Mentor junior developers (Junior WordPress/PHP and Junior Backend, part-time) via code reviews, pairing, and knowledge sharing.
- Collaborate with the BA on specs/acceptance criteria and with the UX designer on admin and AI prompt screens (WordPress today; Next.js designs over time).
- Participate in testing, debugging, and production monitoring (Sentry, logs, plugin version rollbacks) to maintain reliability for paying tenants.
- Document handover, API contracts, and technical debt so Next.js and Flutter mobile teams can consume the same APIs later.
requirements:
Required skills & experience

- 3–5 years of professional software development, with proven ability to own end-to-end features on a live product.
- Strong hands-on experience with PHP and WordPress plugin development (custom tables, hooks, REST API, Action Scheduler, wp-admin JS integration) — required.
- Solid experience building REST APIs in Python (FastAPI preferred; Flask/Django acceptable) and working with relational databases (MySQL and/or PostgreSQL).
- Comfortable reading and extending a large legacy codebase (~600+ PHP files) without unnecessary rewrites.
- Comfortable designing and consuming JSON APIs, implementing authentication (JWT/OAuth, API keys), handling async operations, and managing environment/configuration/secrets.
- Good understanding of cloud deployment concepts (containers, serverless, staging vs production, CI/CD basics); GCP exposure a plus.
- Proficiency with Git and collaborative workflows (pull requests, code reviews).
- Strong problem-solving and ability to work independently on complex tasks with light guidance from the Tech Lead.
- Good English communication (written and spoken) for documentation, team discussions, and collaboration with the CTO.

Nice to have

- Experience with strangler-fig or incremental migration from monolith to services.
- Experience integrating real-time features (WebSockets) or AI/LLM APIs (Anthropic, Grok, OpenAI).
- Familiarity with Google Cloud (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage) or similar.
- Exposure to multi-tenant SaaS (tenant isolation, configurable rules).
- CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Docker, monitoring (Sentry).
- Dutch real estate or proptech domain familiarity.
- Basic awareness of React/Next.js or Flutter (you do not own mobile/web UI in this role, but you build APIs those clients will use).
benefits:
What we offer

- Opportunity to own meaningful work on a live SaaS with real tenants and revenue during a critical handover period.
- Direct collaboration with the Tech Lead and CTO; high autonomy in a small team.
- Clear path to Senior / Lead responsibility as QR scales and ANMP is licensed to white-label partners.
- Remote-friendly environment with flexible hours (HCMC-based core team).
- Competitive salary for mid-level in Vietnam + performance bonuses (details discussed with CTO).
- Hands-on work with WordPress at scale, FastAPI, GCP, AI integrations, and real-world marketplace problems.
- Full-time; Wave 1 hire (from June 2026).

Reporting line

This role reports to the Tech Lead and works closely with the BA, Junior Developer (WordPress/PHP), Junior Backend Developer, UX Designer (part-time), and Data Scientist (part-time). Junior Flutter (mobile) is a separate hire on a later wave.

title: UX Designer (Mobile & Web – AI Realty Platform)
label: HOT
jobDescription:
Mid-level UX Designer responsible for crafting intuitive, user-centered experiences across web and mobile for the Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) and its resellable AI-native Marketplace Platform (ANMP). You will make complex, AI-driven real estate features—such as voice-first interactions with the Grok-powered “Q” agent, price predictions, vendor matching, workflows, and CRM tasks—simple, engaging, fast, and trustworthy for Dutch realtors, vendors, and clients in a multilingual environment (Dutch & English at launch, expandable).

Platform UX scope (aligned with CTO, Tech Lead)

- Long-term web (admin + marketplace): React/Next.js — primary web design target.
- Mobile: Flutter (iOS & Android only) — not Flutter Web for admin.
- Interim production: WordPress admin screens and AI Flow / prompt UIs still in use during handover — design improvements and specs where needed.
- Embeds: third-party sites keep lightweight qr-widget.js — occasional UX input, not full app design.

Current engineering phaseLive users run on the WordPress plugin today; we migrate experience gradually to Next.js and Flutter mobile without breaking tenant workflows.

About Quality Realty (QR)

Quality Realty is an early-stage AI-native SaaS startup building the future of real estate transactions in the Netherlands. We are developing Quality Realty Marketplace (QRM) — a voice-first, multilingual platform that connects realtors, clients, and service vendors (painters, movers, stagers, energy auditors, etc.) throughout the entire home buying, selling, and rental process.

At its core is the AI Native Marketplace Platform (ANMP) — a fully resellable, white-label, multi-tenant marketplace operating system. QR is the first vertical (Dutch real estate), designed from day one to power other local-service marketplaces worldwide.

Key responsibilities

- Conduct user research (interviews, surveys, usability testing, field observations) to understand Dutch real estate users: realtors on the go, clients during viewings, and vendors handling service requests.
- Develop personas, journey maps, task flows, wireframes, and high-fidelity prototypes in Figma for voice-first and visual fallback experiences.
- Design React/Next.js web interfaces (admin portal, marketplace flows): responsive layouts, components, and micro-interactions with clear developer handoff (design tokens, specs, Figma Dev Mode).
- Design Flutter mobile screens and flows in coordination with the Junior Flutter Developer — patterns that map cleanly to Flutter widgets without assuming Flutter Web for admin.
- Support interim WordPress admin and AI prompt / AI Flow screen improvements (per product backlog): usable specs for PHP/admin implementation until those flows move to Next.js.
- Build and evolve a scalable design system (UI kit, typography, color, icons, motion) supporting Dutch/English, WCAG 2.1+, and tenant white-label branding across web and mobile.

jobDescription:
Khách hàng của ITviec cần tìm kiếm ứng viên APO Leader vừa trực tiếp làm việc với khách hàng Nhật trong dự án, vừa đồng hành cùng đội ngũ APO tại chi nhánh Tp.HCM trên hành trình phát triển.

TRÁCH NHIỆM CHÍNH:

1. Làm việc với khách hàng & dự án

● Là đầu mối giao tiếp chính với khách hàng Nhật trong các buổi họp định kỳ, đột xuất, kể cả

tình huống đàm phán ngoài kế hoạch.

● Lý giải, tổng hợp yêu cầu của khách hàng để truyền đạt đầy đủ, chính xác cho đội phát

triển; đồng thời giải thích lại các đề xuất kỹ thuật của team cho khách hàng.

● Chủ động phân tích ảnh hưởng của các thay đổi yêu cầu, làm rõ những điểm mâu thuẫn

với khách hàng trước khi ảnh hưởng đến dự án.

● Có hiểu biết kỹ thuật để phân loại vấn đề (giao diện, backend, dữ liệu, hạ tầng), phối

hợp cùng Tech Lead đánh giá phạm vi ảnh hưởng, đồng thời xây dựng tài liệu và

thuật ngữ dùng chung cho cả nhóm.

2. Điều phối dự án & xử lý vấn đề

● Tiếp nhận định hướng, mục tiêu từ cấp quản lý và chuyển hóa thành kế hoạch hành động

cụ thể (mốc thời gian, đầu việc rõ ràng) cho dự án hoặc nhóm dự án phụ trách.

● Đảm bảo các thành viên trong nhóm tuân thủ đúng quy trình làm việc và tiêu chuẩn bàn

giao đã được thiết lập.

● Theo dõi tình hình của các thành viên, chủ động nhận diện sớm rủi ro (chậm tiến độ, sai

lệch kỳ vọng, phàn nàn từ khách hàng); khi có sự cố, phối hợp cùng quản lý dự án phân

tích nguyên nhân gốc rễ và đề xuất biện pháp khắc phục, phòng ngừa tái diễn.

● Phân tích dữ liệu vận hành của nhóm để phát hiện điểm nghẽn giữa các bộ phận liên

quan, chủ động đề xuất bỏ bớt những việc không tạo giá trị.

3. Quan hệ khách hàng

● Phân tích phong cách giao tiếp và mức độ hài lòng của khách hàng theo từng dự án để

điều chỉnh cách tiếp cận phù hợp.

● Hướng dẫn các thành viên trong nhóm cách ứng xử với khách hàng, xử lý các tình huống

cần báo cáo cấp trên, giữ thái độ bình tĩnh và định hướng giải pháp trong tình huống khó.

4. Đào tạo & phát triển đội ngũ

● Thiết kế các hoạt động đào tạo, huấn luyện và trực tiếp hướng dẫn từng thành viên qua

các tình huống thực tế: đàm phán deadline, xử lý phàn nàn, giải thích nội dung kỹ thuật.

● Đánh giá năng lực từng thành viên để làm cơ sở phân công công việc; phối hợp với bộ

phận nhân sự đề xuất phương án bố trí nhân sự phù hợp với từng dự án.

● Tham gia cùng cấp trên xây dựng mục tiêu cho nhóm/dự án phụ trách; truyền cảm hứng

và lắng nghe để tháo gỡ khó khăn tâm lý cho từng thành viên.

● Chủ động tìm hiểu và đánh giá các công nghệ, công cụ mới (kể cả AI) có thể ứng dụng vào

công việc của nhóm; tổ chức các buổi chia sẻ, workshop nội bộ để cả team cùng nâng cấp

năng lực.

● Quan sát và phát hiện các thành viên có tiềm năng phát triển, đề xuất với cấp quản lý về

lộ trình phát triển hoặc phương án bồi dưỡng phù hợp cho từng người
requirements:
1. Kinh nghiệm & chuyên môn

● Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc trong doanh nghiệp Nhật Bản, trong đó có ít nhất

thức), có khả năng truyền đạt tốt và xây dựng tinh thần đội nhóm.

2. Tư duy & thái độ làm việc

● Tư duy logic, phân tích và xử lý vấn đề nhanh nhạy, kể cả trong tình huống chưa rõ ràng

hoặc áp lực cao.

● Chủ động, tinh thần trách nhiệm cao, sẵn sàng gánh vác kết quả chung của cả đội ngũ.

title: New Product Development Engineer(Fullstack & English)
label: HOT
