jobDescription: We are looking for a Senior Full-stack web developer with NodeJS/ Python and ReactJS with a strong background in API design, databases, performance, scalability, security, etc to join our team. You will be working across a range of projects and industries, building scalable and high-performance web solutions.
requirements:
Requirements

Must have

- 7+ years of experience in backend development using Python/NodeJS
- 3+ years of experience in frontend development using ReactJS or similar frameworks (Vue, Svelte, Angular)
- Proven expertise in designing and implementing RESTful APIs, scalable web architecture, and deploying to cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience integrating AI/ML solutions into web applications
- Strong working knowledge of relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)
- Familiarity with Extreme Programming (XP) practices such as Test-Driven Development (TDD), Continuous Integration (CI), and code refactoring
- Experience working within Agile/Scrum teams
- Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal
- Experience leading project teams through the full life cycle of software development
- Experience supporting other team tasks such as mentoring, creating proposals, designing architecture for a project, etc.

Nice to have

- Experience designing and building AI architecture for production-grade applications
- Experience with serverless architecture, e.g., AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Function, etc.
- Experience with security, performance, and scalability.
- Experience with NoSQL and Message Queue.
benefits:
Who We Are

CodeLink is an innovative and design-focused development agency. We focus on user-centric design and agile development to bring the product vision of our clients to life. We handle the end-to-end development of products, developing the product vision through product understanding, designing experiences through UX design, refining these flows with modern UI design, and developing products through iterative agile development.

We work with both early-stage product teams and teams with existing products from a wide range of countries and industries. We focus on modern technologies and work directly with our clients. We design using design-thinking principles on tools such as Sketch, Figma, Zeplin, and more, and develop products leveraging our tech stack of React, React Native, Rails, Python, and Node.JS.

Our Core Values

1. Take full ownership of deliveryWe take ownership of our client projects and ensure that we deliver what we are in charge of to the best possible outcome.

2. Deliver our highest level of qualityWe take pride in the high quality that we deliver and work at a sustainable pace to ensure we can always deliver on that quality.

3. Stay consistent in plans and processesWe keep open and transparent communication with our teammates and our client whilst following agile development practices.

4. Have empathy for all those we work withWe show empathy and respect to all those we work with to gain a deeper understanding without any judgment or assumption.

5. Continuously improve and growWe aim high with a growth mindset and see every day as an opportunity to develop ourselves, our processes, and our products.

Top 3 Reasons To Join Us

- Use cutting-edge & proven technologies
- Work directly with international clients
- Open environment with a focus on learning

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market.

- We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking, and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team.
- We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand, and believe in what they are developing.
- We are very selective with our clients, we only work on awesome products we believe in and that show strong market potential.
- We respect you and your personal hours, we keep a sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve.
- We are fully agile and only work with Clients who work the same, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity.
- You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

Company Benefits

- An open and dynamic working environment with no dress code and the freedom to be yourself.
- Modern open-space office with comfortable workspace, a PS5 games room, and chill-out areas.
- Salary review twice a year with opportunities for promotions and spot awards.
- Yearly Training Budget up to 5 million VND per staff.
- Culture of recognition with monthly rewards for those with the most kudos.
- All office benefits and full salary during probation.
- Flexible starting time up to 10 AM working Monday - Friday with no overtime and a long lunch break.
- Two days remote every week taken on any days you choose so you can work from wherever you like.
- Full Vietnamese holidays off with 12 annual leave days per year with all days not taken paid out in cash.
- Yearly company trip, monthly team all-hands activities, welcome lunches for new members, the monthly budget for team celebrations.
- Celebrations for special days in the year, such as Women’s Day, YEP, Christmas.
- Gold level Health Insurance coverage from Bao Viet Insurance and a yearly complete Health Check.
- Employee-led clubs within the company; games teams, sports teams, etc.
- Buddy system, tech, and product talks, mentoring, and paid-for training for any skills you’d like to develop.
- Weekly agile sessions and professional coaching.
- Meal allowance, parking allowance, petrol allowance, and unlimited snacks and coffee every day.
- Options for a full MAC or PC set-up are completely provided.

Where We Work

HCMC Head Office: Level 8, Vina Building, 131 Xo Viet Nghe Tinh, Ward 17, Binh Thanh District, HCMC

Hanoi Office: Ba Dinh District, Ha Noi City

Da Nang Office: Level 8, Bach Dang Complex, 50 Bach Dang, Hai Chau Ward, Da Nang City

title: Middle DevOps Engineer (Microservices, CI/CD, Docker)
label: HOT
reasons:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Competitive Package
- Full salary-based social insurance
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Middle DevOps Engineer with 3–5 years of experience to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, implementing, and optimizing infrastructure, automating software delivery through CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring the scalability, reliability, and high availability of our platform. This role requires a proactive mindset, strong system design thinking, and hands-on experience with modern cloud-native technologies.

Key Responsibilities

- Design, implement, and maintain infrastructure based on Microservices architecture and distributed systems, ensuring high scalability and fault tolerance.
- Build and optimize end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using GitLab CI, Jenkins, and ArgoCD to shorten software release cycles.
- Develop automation scripts for operational tasks, deployment, and monitoring using Bash, Python, or equivalent programming languages.
- Manage and operate containerized environments with Docker and orchestrate containers on Kubernetes platforms (EKS, GKE, or on-premises environments).
- Implement and manage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools.
- Set up, monitor, back up, and upgrade MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases, ensuring performance, availability, and data integrity.
- Build and maintain monitoring and alerting systems using tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, or equivalent solutions.
- Collaborate closely with Development (Dev), Quality Assurance (QA), and Security teams to ensure a seamless DevOps process.
- Participate in incident response activities, perform root cause analysis (RCA), and propose preventive solutions to improve system reliability.
requirements:
Work Experience

- 3–5 years of experience as a DevOps Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer (SRE), or similar role.
- Solid understanding of Microservices architecture and Distributed Systems.
- Hands-on experience building and optimizing CI/CD pipelines with GitLab CI, Jenkins, and ArgoCD.
- Strong scripting skills using Bash, Python, or similar programming languages.
- Practical experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and container orchestration platforms.
- Experience implementing Infrastructure as Code using Terraform, Ansible, or similar tools.
- Hands-on experience deploying, monitoring, and upgrading MongoDB and PostgreSQL databases.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience working with Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
- Knowledge of infrastructure and cloud security, including secrets management and network policies.
- Experience with messaging platforms such as Kafka, RabbitMQ, or NATS.
- Familiarity with GitOps workflows and Service Mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd).
- Experience operating high-traffic, high-availability production systems.

Nice-To-Have Qualifications:

- Experience building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) or Platform Engineering solutions.
- Experience supporting large-scale systems serving thousands of users.
- Continuous improvement mindset with the ability to proactively identify and implement infrastructure and process optimizations.
benefits:
- Performance & salary review yearly
- Paid social insurance based on full salary
- Bao Viet Insurance
- Medical Checkup
- 15 days of annual leave
- Parking allowance

title: Head of Engineering
company: Công ty CP dịch vụ TMĐT N&H
label: HOT
reasons:
- Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, năng động
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh cao
- Nhiều cơ hội thăng tiến
jobDescription:
- Sở hữu toàn bộ technical direction: Xây dựng và thực thi roadmap công nghệ 6–18 tháng, cân bằng giữa velocity sản phẩm và nợ kỹ thuật — trình bày và bảo vệ trước CEO và Board.
- Xây dựng và phát triển engineering team: Trực tiếp tuyển dụng, onboard và phát triển đội ngũ kỹ sư phù hợp với quy mô và nhu cầu từng giai đoạn phát triển của công ty — xây dựng career ladder, văn hóa ownership và môi trường học hỏi liên tục.
- Kiến trúc hệ thống data hiện đại: Dẫn dắt thiết kế và triển khai data platform theo mô hình Medallion (Bronze → Silver → Gold), đảm bảo data đáp ứng yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, có khả năng scale và sẵn sàng cho AI/ML workload.
- Định hướng AI cho doanh nghiệp: Xác định và triển khai các use case AI có giá trị thực tế — từ automation nội bộ đến tính năng AI trong sản phẩm — đảm bảo áp dụng có chọn lọc, đo lường được và phù hợp chiến lược tăng trưởng.
- Đảm bảo chất lượng hệ thống ở quy mô lớn: Kiến trúc đảm bảo uptime, khả năng mở rộng và bảo mật — bao gồm giám sát, incident response và CI/CD pipeline.
- Là cầu nối giữa Engineering và Business: Phối hợp chặt với Product và các phòng ban để translate business goal thành technical execution — push back khi cần, commit khi đã quyết.
- Quản lý ngân sách và vendor: Lập kế hoạch và kiểm soát ngân sách công nghệ, đánh giá và đàm phán với nhà cung cấp cloud và công cụ phát triển.
requirements:
- Tối thiểu 5 năm ở vị trí Engineering Manager hoặc tương đương, với track record trực tiếp quản lý và phát triển team từ 8 người trở lên — bao gồm hiring, mentoring và khi cần thiết, offboarding.
- Nền tảng kỹ thuật đủ vững để review architecture, phát hiện blind spot trong thiết kế hệ thống và đưa ra quyết định trade-off có cơ sở. Hiểu sâu system design, distributed systems và database — không cần code hằng ngày nhưng phải đủ depth để dẫn dắt technical discussion.
- Có tư duy ra quyết định dựa trên data, không phải cảm tính. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế xây dựng data warehouse / data lakehouse theo kiến trúc Medallion (Bronze / Silver / Gold) — quen thuộc với Apache Spark, Apache Flink hoặc tương đương. Đảm bảo hệ thống data phục vụ được cả yêu cầu nghiệp vụ lẫn khả năng scale dài hạn.
- Có quan điểm rõ ràng về cách ứng dụng AI tạo ra giá trị kinh doanh thực tế — không chỉ theo trend. Có khả năng xác định use case phù hợp, đánh giá trade-off giữa build vs buy, và dẫn dắt team triển khai AI có trách nhiệm, đo lường được hiệu quả.
- Đã từng làm việc tại startup hoặc công ty đang scale — quen với môi trường ambiguous, thiếu resource và cần ra quyết định nhanh với thông tin không đầy đủ.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế xây dựng hệ thống trong ít nhất một lĩnh vực: SaaS B2B, Logistics/Fulfillment, E-commerce, hoặc nền tảng phục vụ nhiều merchant/seller đồng thời.
- Có khả năng đọc hiểu business metric, đề xuất technical initiative xuất phát từ business problem — không chỉ từ technical excellence.
- Đã xử lý thực tế: high-concurrency, race condition, distributed transaction, real-time data pipeline hoặc multi-tenant architecture
- Đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật, tham gia thảo luận với đối tác hoặc investor nước ngoài khi cần
benefits:
- Thời gian làm việc từ T2-T6 hàng tuần.
- Lương, thưởng, phụ cấp:+ Lương: Thỏa thuận theo năng lực + Thưởng cuối năm ( thưởng tết)+ Xét tăng lương: hàng năm (theo hiệu quả thực hiện)+ Phụ cấp: ăn trưa.+ BHXH, BHYT, phép năm theo Luật lao động và quy định của Công ty.+ Đầy đủ các chế độ phúc lợi hiếu hỉ, sinh nhật, du lịch,...
- Môi trường làm việc năng động và chuyên nghiệp. Văn hóa Công ty tốt.
- Nhiều cơ hội học hỏi, phát triển và thăng tiến dành cho nhân viên có năng lực.

title: Senior Business Intelligence Analyst
company: Công ty CP dịch vụ TMĐT N&H
label: HOT
reasons:
- Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, năng động
- Thu nhập cạnh tranh cao
- Nhiều cơ hội thăng tiến
jobDescription:
Xây dựng và phát triển hệ thống BI (Business Intelligence)

- Thiết kế, kiến trúc và tối ưu hóa hệ thống báo cáo quản trị, phục vụ định hướng chiến lược của Ban Giám đốc và hoạt động của các khối phòng ban.
- Xây dựng hệ thống Dashboard KPI theo thời gian thực (Real-time) cho các mắt xích trọng yếu: Kho vận (Fulfillment), Vận tải (Logistics), Dịch vụ Khách hàng (CS), Kinh doanh và Tài chính.
- Chủ động đề xuất và triển khai các giải pháp tự tự động hóa báo cáo, hỗ trợ bộ máy ra quyết định hoàn toàn dựa trên dữ liệu (Data-driven).

Phân tích dữ liệu vận hành chuyên sâu

- Khai thác, chuẩn hóa và phân tích dữ liệu đa nguồn từ các hệ thống lõi: WMS, OMS, ERP, TMS, CRM.
- Bóc tách và phân tích các chỉ số vận hành cốt lõi: Năng suất lao động (UPH), Tỷ lệ giao hàng đúng hạn (SLA), Lead time, Tỷ lệ lệch tồn kho và Chi phí logistics trên mỗi đơn hàng (CPU).
- Thiết kế các mô hình phân tích, dự báo xu hướng (Forecasting) để nhận diện rủi ro, điểm nghẽn (bottlenecks) và cơ hội tối ưu hóa chuỗi cung ứng.
- Chuyển hóa dữ liệu phức tạp thành các khuyến nghị chiến lược thực chiến cho Ban Giám đốc.

Quản trị chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Governance)

- Quy hoạch và chuẩn hóa cấu trúc Data Model phục vụ phân tích.
- Xây dựng các chốt chặn kiểm soát chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Quality Checks), đảm bảo tính chính xác và đồng nhất tuyệt đối giữa các hệ thống chéo.
- Phối hợp chặt chẽ với khối IT/Data Engineer để cải thiện luồng dữ liệu (Data Pipeline).

Dẫn dắt dự án & Nâng cao năng lực tổ chức

- Trực tiếp tham gia thiết kế kiến trúc Data Warehouse, Data Mart và nền tảng dữ liệu doanh nghiệp.
- Ứng dụng công nghệ xử lý dữ liệu hiện đại và AI vào việc dự báo sản lượng, quản trị vận hành kho bãi.
- Đào tạo, dẫn dắt (coach) và phát triển tư duy dữ liệu cho các chuyên viên phân tích cấp dưới (Junior/Mid-level) và người dùng khối nghiệp vụ.
requirements:
Học vấn & Kinh nghiệm

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành: Khoa học Dữ liệu (Data Science), Hệ thống Thông tin Quản lý (MIS), Công nghệ Thông tin, Toán Thống kê hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm thực chiến tại vị trí Senior BI Analyst, Senior Data Analyst hoặc tương đương.
- Từng có kinh nghiệm dẫn dắt team nhỏ 2 bạn, định hướng phát triển ở các vị trí cao hơn
- Lợi thế cực lớn: Ứng viên có background làm việc trực tiếp tại các công ty E-commerce, Logistics, Chuỗi cung ứng (Supply Chain) hoặc Hệ thống Fulfillment phức tạp.
- Từng có kinh nghiệm làm chủ (own) hệ thống Dashboard và các chỉ số quản trị cấp công ty.

Năng lực Chuyên môn (Tech Stack & Domain Knowledge)

- Kỹ thuật: Thành thạo SQL nâng cao. Trải nghiệm sâu sắc với Power BI và Excel nâng cao (Power Query, Power Pivot).
- Kiến trúc: Có tư duy và kinh nghiệm tự thiết kế Data Model, luồng ETL và Data Warehouse. Quen thuộc với các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu (SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL). Biết sử dụng Python để xử lý dữ liệu là một điểm cộng.
- Nghiệp vụ (Domain): Hiểu rõ bản chất các chỉ số đo lường hiệu suất kho bãi và giao nhận (SLA, Productivity, Inventory Accuracy, Return Rate).

Kỹ năng bổ trợ

- Tư duy giải quyết vấn đề (Problem-solving) nhạy bén, khả năng bóc tách nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis).
- Kỹ năng giao tiếp xuất sắc: Biết kể chuyện bằng dữ liệu (Data Storytelling) để thuyết phục các phòng ban không chuyên về kỹ thuật (Non-tech stakeholders).
- Khả năng làm việc độc lập tốt và kỹ năng quản trị nhiều dự án (Multitasking) cùng lúc.
benefits:
- Đãi ngộ: Mức lương thỏa thuận không giới hạn dựa trên năng lực thực tế. Thưởng hiệu suất công việc và kết quả kinh doanh định kỳ.
- Bảo đảm: Hưởng đầy đủ các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo luật định.
- Dấu ấn nghề nghiệp: Được trao quyền trực tiếp kiến tạo và xây dựng hệ thống nền tảng dữ liệu chuyển đổi số cho một tổ chức Fulfillment năng động.
- Phát triển: Lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng lên các vị trí quản lý cấp cao như BI Manager hoặc Data Manager.

title: DevOps Engineer
label: HOT
reasons:

jobDescription:
Job Description:

We are looking for a talented DevOps Engineer to join our dynamic team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing our AWS EKS infrastructure, monitoring system backends, creating new microservices, and ensuring the security of our infrastructure. This role requires a high level of technical expertise and attention to detail.

Responsibilities:

- Monitor system backend including CPU, RAM, and POD in AWS EKS.
- Manage AWS EKS's UAT and PRO, including upgrading EKS versions as required.

jobDescription:
Are you a Technical Scrum Master that can still code and test when your team requires it? Do you have an experience in product development and a desire to build high-performing teams? If so read on.

About our Team

Our team is responsible for creating a brand of new digital financial platforms and apps that are highly reliable and scalable using modern engineering practices. You will be joining a project which talented software engineers in our Digital Bank Build team who is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining the new digital banking platform and the customer channels. As part of the team, you will be responsible for implementing software features, involve in technical designs, and writing tests to ensure the high-quality delivery of the product. The teams operate in Scrum and DevOps models.

We’re looking for top engineers out there! During the interview process, we will test your coding and design skills to assess your experience and depth of knowledge. Don’t worry our interview process will be fun!

What is the role?

We are looking for an experienced and versatile Technical Scrum Master who will be responsible for building a new scrum team for the delivery of one of our new fintech products.

Technical Scrum Master’s critical responsibility is for the team and for optimal flow of work to DONE. Scrum Masters are expected to do this by setting the pace for delivery and being proactive in planning and forecasting upcoming deliverables. To be successful in the role you should demonstrate pragmatism in your approach and be sensitive to the environment that we operate in, using your skills and knowledge to appropriately influence the delivery approach.

We are seeking a motivated individual with:

- Excellent English speaking and writing skills. (Mandatory)
- Foster an open, honest and transparent relationship with key stakeholders
- Excellent presentation and facilitation, coaching, and mentorship skills
- Strong stakeholder management and communications experience
- Strong ability to influence cross-functional teams and leadership
- Demonstrate assertiveness, being the voice of reason and authority
- Must be enthusiastic and bring high energy to the delivery team
- Responsible for continuous delivery and management of technical debt
- Previous experience leading small teams while still being hands-on
requirements:
Requirements:

- At least 2+ years of recent experience as a Scrum Master.
- Accountable for the quality of agile ceremonies including daily scrums, sprint planning, showcases, and retrospectives
- Ability to provide constructive and timely feedback to delivery team members and stakeholders
- Conflict resolution within/between the delivery team and stakeholders
- Ability to negotiate priorities and timelines with stakeholders
- Setting the pace/cadence for delivery and motivating teams to succeed
- Ensuring the delivery team commits to their definition of done
- Visual representation and management of work in the sprint e.g. card walls and burn-up charts
- Management of Master Story List (MSL), ensuring it is adequately maintained, stories are up to date and ready to play into a sprint

Knowledge of at least 3 of the following areas:

- Mobile: iOS or Android
- Web: HTML5, CSS3, Angular JS, Javascript
- Microsoft .Net (C#, ASP, Framework), SQL Server
- Quality Assurance, Automation Testing
- Web Security, OWASP
- Java, Oracle
- DevOps, Continuous Delivery
benefits:
You’ll love working with us if you are:

- Passionate about technology.
- Independent but also a good team player.
- Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity.
- Focused on usability and speed.
- Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management.

At GOTYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership.

Trách nhiệmSoundGraph đang tìm kiếm một ứng viên có khả năng sử dụng tiếng Hàn và tiếng Anh tốt để hỗ trợ giao tiếp với đội ngũ phát triển tại Việt Nam, theo dõi tiến độ công việc và đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm trong quá trình phát triển ứng dụng mobile. Đây là vị trí phù hợp với ứng viên từng học tập tại Hàn Quốc, có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với team kỹ thuật, hiểu quy trình làm việc với developer và có thể hỗ trợ chia sẻ tài liệu, theo dõi issue, tổng hợp feedback một cách rõ ràng.

Ưu tiên- Có hiểu biết cơ bản về quy trình phát triển mobile app iOS/Android.- Từng làm IT Comtor, QA, Project Coordinator, Technical Assistant hoặc vị trí hỗ trợ team dev.- Có kinh nghiệm sử dụng các công cụ issue tracking/project management như Jira, Notion, Trello, Slack hoặc các công cụ tương tự.- Có khả năng kiểm thử app, ghi nhận bug và viết feedback rõ ràng.- Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với team Hàn Quốc hoặc team phát triển tại Việt Nam.

Vì sao nên ứng tuyển?Đây là cơ hội phù hợp cho ứng viên có thế mạnh tiếng Hàn – tiếng Anh, muốn bước vào môi trường công nghệ và làm việc trực tiếp với team phát triển sản phẩm. title: Senior Technical Project Manager
jobDescription:
We are seeking a Senior Technical Project Manager to join our dynamic team. In this role, you will be responsible for overseeing the successful delivery of multiple software projects, ensuring they are executed within the scope, timeline, and budget.

The ideal candidate will have a strong background in project management, excellent communication skills, and a proven ability to work with cross-functional teams. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of our product, SimpleMDG, by driving the excellent execution of implementation phases and successful delivery of projects.

Responsibilities

Project Leadership & Delivery

- Define project scope, objectives, deliverables, and success criteria.
- Lead the project team through all phases of the software development lifecycle, ensuring technical decisions align with project goals and timelines.
- Monitor overall project health (schedule, budget, quality, scope, and team velocity) and proactively escalate deviations with clear remediation plans.

Risk & Impact Management

- Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks, including technical, resourcing, and delivery risks.
- Conduct impact assessments for scope changes, architectural decisions, and cross-service dependencies before approving changes.
- Maintain a risk register and drive mitigation actions to closure with the technical team.

Technical Oversight

- Engage with the engineering team to understand system architecture, component design, and service-to-service integration, ensuring project plans reflect real technical complexity and dependencies.
- Partner with technical leads to review the feasibility of estimates, designs, and refactoring efforts, ensuring decisions consider the broader system rather than isolated components.
- Support technical quality management by ensuring project outcomes meet defined engineering and quality standards.

Team Management & Collaboration

- Manage and mentor project team members, ensuring clear role definition, accountability, and effective collaboration.
- Conduct regular performance reviews and provide constructive, actionable feedback.
- Foster a team environment where members communicate openly and contribute effectively.
- Coordinate with the Resource Manager to fulfill staffing requests and manage resource allocation across projects.

Stakeholder Communication

- Liaise with sales, clients, and onshore team members on staffing, technical matters, and project status.
- Coordinate with BA, QC, DEV and other project parties to ensure client satisfaction and alignment on deliverables.
- Facilitate effective, transparent communication between team members, stakeholders, and leadership.
- Undertake additional tasks as assigned by the Board of Directors (BOD).
requirements:
Education: University degree in IT or a related field.

Certifications: PMP certification is required.

Ability to work in the evening or early morning based on the project.

Experience:

- Minimum of 5 years in a project management role, ideally with prior hands-on technical or software development experience (e.g., developer, technical lead, or solution architect background).
- Proficient in at least one project management methodology (Agile/Scrum, Waterfall) with knowledge of UML being a plus.
- Proficient in project management tools (e.g., JIRA, Trello, Asana, MS Project).
- Experience in ERP.
- Demonstrated experience leading technical risk assessments and evaluating architectural or system-level impact.

Skills:

- Fluent in English for direct communication with onshore teams and clients.
- Mastery of software development estimation methods.
- Solid technical understanding of software architecture, system components, and service-to-service integration/communication, sufficient to evaluate design and refactoring proposals holistically.
- Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills, with the ability to manage and develop cross-functional teams.
- Ability to manage complex projects and accounts, balancing technical depth with delivery pressure.
- Knowledge of business analysis skills is a plus.

Attributes:

- Proactive, with a can-do attitude and strong problem-solving skills.
- High sense of organization and responsibility.
- Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities effectively.
- Strong critical thinking, able to evaluate technical decisions from a whole-system perspective rather than in isolation.

title: QA Lead (Automation Test, SQL)
label: NEW
jobDescription:
We are looking for a hands-on QA Lead to own quality across a large-scale, multi-tenant enterprise web platform with complex transactional workflows, multiple third-party integrations, and data-intensive features.

This is a technical leadership role, not a process-only management role. Beyond defining QA strategy and leading the team, you are expected to verify issues at the root-cause level: query the database, read the code, trace the logs, and confirm — or challenge — an engineer's diagnosis. You will define what "release-ready" means and be accountable for the platform working correctly in production.

You will work closely with Product Managers, Software Engineers, and DevOps teams throughout the software development lifecycle, driving quality from requirements through production operation.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. QA Leadership

- Lead, mentor, and grow the QA team; set consistent testing practices and high engineering standards.
- Define and continuously improve QA processes, testing standards, release criteria, and quality metrics (defect escape rate, automation coverage, time-to-verify).
- Plan and allocate testing capacity across parallel product streams; ensure testing activities complete on schedule without sacrificing depth.
- Partner with Engineering and Product teams to establish quality objectives for each release.

2. Test Strategy & Planning

- Participate in requirement reviews, technical design discussions, and sprint planning to surface quality and integration risks early.
- Define risk-based test strategies, test plans, and coverage across functional, regression, integration, end-to-end, and user acceptance layers.
- Review and approve test cases, test reports, and release readiness documentation.

3. Deep Verification & Triage

- Reproduce and isolate reported issues down to root cause: distinguish frontend, API, data, integration, and infrastructure failures.
- Verify data states directly in relational databases and search indexes; trace requests through gateway and service logs.
- Read backend and automation code well enough to confirm or challenge a proposed root cause, and to validate that a fix addresses the cause rather than the symptom.
- Track defect resolution and verify fixes against root cause before production deployment.

4. Test Automation

- Design, build, and maintain the automated testing framework (Playwright) for web and API layers.
- Grow automated regression coverage and reduce manual regression effort release over release.
- Review automation code and enforce automation best practices.
- Integrate automated suites into CI/CD pipelines as blocking quality gates.

5. Integration & Asynchronous Systems Testing

- Test event-driven and asynchronous flows: message processing, retries, idempotency, and eventual consistency (e.g., search index and cache synchronization).
- Own the test strategy for third-party integrations (payment and other external services): sandbox usage, contract validation, and failure-mode simulation (timeouts, partial failures, reconciliation).

6. Security & Access Control Testing

- Design and execute multi-tenant data isolation tests: cross-tenant access attempts, IDOR, and role/permission boundary cases.
- Test authentication and authorization flows (OIDC/JWT, role- and policy-based access) across organization and user roles.
- Apply OWASP Top 10 awareness in test design; verify security fixes together with the engineering and security teams.

7. Release Quality & Production Assurance

- Define and enforce release quality gates and deployment readiness criteria.
- Maintain production smoke and post-release verification suites; validate every production release.
- Participate in incident triage and root-cause analysis; convert production incidents into permanent regression tests.
- Ensure software releases meet quality, security, and stability requirements.
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field.
- Minimum 5 years of experience in Software Quality Assurance; at least 2 years leading QA teams or owning QA processes.
- Strong SQL (PostgreSQL): able to write verification queries and independently confirm data states.
- Able to read TypeScript/JavaScript at a level sufficient to review automation code and validate root-cause analysis.
- Hands-on experience building and maintaining automated testing frameworks using Playwright or equivalent tools.
- Strong REST API testing experience (Postman or similar), including authenticated flows (JWT/OIDC).
- Experience testing systems with asynchronous or event-driven components (message queues, background jobs) and eventual-consistency behavior.
- Security testing fundamentals: authorization testing, IDOR, OWASP Top 10.
- Experience integrating automated testing into CI/CD pipelines as quality gates.
- Strong understanding of SDLC and STLC; experience with Agile/Scrum and Jira.
- English reading skills sufficient for technical documentation.

Preferred Qualifications

- Experience testing multi-tenant SaaS, e-commerce/marketplace, or payment systems.
- Performance testing with k6: load profiles, thresholds, and CI integration.
- Experience testing AI-assisted or search/ranking features: golden datasets, output-quality regression, relevance evaluation.
- Ability to read Python for validating AI/ML service behavior and diagnosing issues in AI-assisted features.
- Data pipeline testing experience: data synchronization validation, source-to-target reconciliation, data quality checks.
- Experience in regulated or compliance-sensitive environments (data protection regulations such as PDPL or GDPR).
- Familiarity with containerized environments and centralized logging/observability tooling.
- Experience establishing QA metrics, dashboards, and release quality reporting.
- ISTQB Foundation or Advanced Certification.
benefits:
I. Giá trị cốt lõi

Automation

Arobid có các quy trình để giúp duy trì hiệu quả công việc cũng như sự hài lòng của nhân viên. “Tự chủ” trong nguồn nhân lực của Arobid cho phép nhân viên minh bạch và tích cực trong việc giải quyết vấn đề.

Responsibility

Nhân viên Arobid chịu trách nhiệm về công việc, hành vi, thái độ cũng như sự phát triển của chính Arobid. Sự thành công của Arobid dựa trên trách nhiệm và nỗ lực của từng cá nhân.

Open-mindedness

Tư duy cởi mở ở nhân viên của chúng tôi là quan trọng để giúp tạo điều kiện cho những thay đổi lớn và nhanh luôn xảy ra trong ngành công nghiệp công nghệ. Cũng như trong việc học hỏi những điều mới và phát triển những cách thức mới, tư duy cởi mở cũng đề cập đến việc chấp nhận sự khác biệt trong đồng nghiệp, không phân biệt giới tính, quốc tịch, tuổi tác.

Boldness

Dũng cảm, cho phép nhân viên của chúng tôi có thể mạo hiểm, thử nghiệm các phương pháp mới và độc đáo trong việc giải quyết vấn đề. Dũng cảm khác với sự liều lĩnh, dũng cảm đề cập đến các kế hoạch đã được suy nghĩ kỹ lưỡng, thử nghiệm và nghiên cứu cẩn thận và sẽ được thực hiện một cách đúng đắn.

Innovation

Sự đổi mới đề cập đến việc thúc đẩy những phương pháp mới, nhân viên tại Arobid luôn phải phát triển khả năng của bản thân, học những cách thức mới và áp dụng chúng vào công việc hàng ngày. Làm cho công việc khó khăn trở nên đơn giản và nhanh chóng hơn.

Devotion

Sự tận tâm, nhân viên Arobid coi Arobid như một nơi họ thuộc về. Tin tưởng vào sự hình thành của Arobid và mục tiêu cũng như sứ mệnh của Arobid. Cùng nhau, điều này tạo ra một mối liên kết giữa cá nhân với công ty cũng như giữa các đồng nghiệp Arobid.

II. Phúc Lợi:

title: Android Infotainment, Camera & Media Application Engine
company: Suntech Vina (Hợp tác cùng tập đoàn CNTT hàng đầu Ấn độ)
jobDescription:
Suntech Vina is currently partnering with KPIT Technologies to recruit top-tier talent for their very first office in Hanoi.

About KPIT:

A leading global technology company specializing in automotive software and smart mobility solutions. At KPIT, you will thrive in a dynamic, collaborative environment, working on cutting-edge technologies alongside a talented global engineering team.

Job Summary:

The Android Infotainment, Camera & Media Application Engineer will lead the development, architecture, and feature optimization of passenger-facing applications within the vehicle cabin. This role focuses on global radio applications, multi-source media center aggregation (USB, Bluetooth, Streaming), local file-browsing services, gallery asset management, and critical low-latency video recording systems like the automotive Digital Video Recorder (DVR/Dashcam).

Key Responsibilities:

- Design and implement localized automotive applications utilizing modern Android UI toolkits, ensuring multi-language support, regional requirements, and responsive designs.
- Develop a unified multi-source multimedia aggregation application (CarMedia) supporting cross-input playlist management, audio/video playback engines, and seamless state transitions.
- Architect and maintain the Digital Video Recorder (DVR) module, managing continuous loop recording, file browser indexing, playback frameworks, and automatic sensor-triggered emergency clip preservation.
- Optimize USB local media services (USB music) and asset viewers (Gallery), refining preview generations, filtering operations, and resolving framework performance lags.
- Implement high-performance dynamic user interface components, such as vector-based HVAC climate control animations, without introducing framework-level UI stuttering.
requirements:
- Deep expertise in Android Application architecture (MVVM/MVI), custom views, and rendering optimization (Jetpack Compose or Android View System).
- Strong knowledge of the Android Media Framework, ExoPlayer, storage abstraction access, and broadcast radio APIs.
- Proficiency in managing camera pipelines, local file structures, memory caching, and raw asset streaming buffers.
- Advanced proficiency in Kotlin and Java, with a solid grasp of writing efficient asynchronous code using Coroutines or RxJava.

Required Qualifications:

- Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- 1-6+ years of experience in Android development, with at least 3 years specializing in Automotive HMI, multimedia routing, or embedded camera applications.

Desired / Preferred Qualifications:

- Familiarity with automotive event listening (e.g., G-Sensor crash triggers hitting the application layer via VHAL/CarService)
benefits:

- Hợp tác với các tập đoàn toàn cầu: Tham gia cùng một trong những công ty kỹ thuật CNTT hàng đầu Ấn Độ, được tin cậy bởi nhiều OEM và Tier-1, và một tập đoàn công nghệ ô tô toàn cầu đang cung cấp digital cockpit & giải pháp xe thông minh cho hàng triệu phương tiện.

title: Data Solutions Architect / Lead Data Engineer
label: NEW
jobDescription:
About AIRR Labs

AIRR Labs, headquartered in Singapore, is a leading e-commerce enabler in Southeast Asia, specializing in FMCG, Beauty, and Lifestyle brands across platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopee, and Lazada. Since 2019, AIRR Labs has grown to more than 350 experts across Thailand, the Philippines, Vietnam, Malaysia, and Singapore, with a technology hub in Vietnam.

We partner with global brands including Unilever, Colgate-Palmolive, Estée Lauder, and Adidas to deliver end-to-end digital commerce solutions spanning content strategy, performance marketing, livestreaming, store operations, and fulfillment.

About the Role

This is a senior technical leadership role with direct ownership of the data foundation that supports the business. The successful candidate will set the architectural direction for the data platform and remain hands-on across code, pipelines, and systems.

This is a high-impact opportunity to lead strategic projects, collaborate directly with senior leadership, and shape the data backbone of a core ecommerce and SaaS business.

Role Overview

- Architecture (50%) — Define data models, schema design, and platform architecture; set the technical direction and standards that the wider organization adopts and builds upon.
- Engineering (35%) — Design, build, and optimize ETL/ELT pipelines, author performant SQL and transformation logic, and maintain data quality across TB-scale datasets. This role remains hands-on in production.
- Operations (15%) — Monitor platform health, resolve incidents, and ensure the reliability and performance of the cloud data infrastructure.

Key Responsibilities

Architecture:

- Own data modelling, schema design, and end-to-end platform architecture.
- Establish architecture standards, naming conventions, and documentation practices across the data layer.

Pipelines:

- Design, build, and maintain scalable data pipelines across our AWS (S3, Lambda) and data warehouse environment.
- Write efficient, optimized SQL for analytics, reporting, and data product use cases.

AI Foundation:

- Build the data layer that serves as the foundation for the organization's AI and machine learning roadmap.

Reliability:

- Monitor infrastructure health, respond to incidents, and drive root-cause analysis.
requirements:
Requirements

- 8+ years in data or software engineering, including a track record of owning a data platform or major system end-to-end.
- Demonstrated ownership of architecture decisions — build-versus-buy calls, technology selection, and setting technical direction across multiple teams.
- Strong SQL skills with experience optimizing complex queries on large datasets (TB-scale).
- Hands-on experience with AWS S3 and Lambda. Experience with Databricks or a comparable analytical database (e.g., ClickHouse, Single Store, BigQuery).
- Solid understanding of data modelling (star schema, ERD, normalization trade-offs).
- Familiarity with ETL/ELT orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, dbt, Apache Dolphin).
- Proficiency in Python or another scripting language for pipeline development.
- Prior experience in ecommerce or tech industry preferred.
benefits:
What We Offer:

- Opportunity to work on cutting-edge AI technologies that transform how businesses create content.
- A collaborative, innovative environment with opportunities for professional growth.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer - Azure Cloud (1 year Contract)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
reasons:
- Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus
- Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members
- 16++ days of paid leave per year
jobDescription:
This position will be contracted through Bosch’s external vendor under a one-year agreement.

The EPM department focuses on software tooling development to support embedded products in the XC which including Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS), Car Multimedia domain. We develop tools that streamline software and system development for technologies such as radar, video, HMI and ultrasonic sensors. Serving global teams across Japan, China, Europe, and Vietnam, we contribute to the advancement of secure, safe, and intelligent mobility solutions.

We are looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to join our growing engineering team and support the stability, scalability, and performance of our cloud and on-premises infrastructure. This is a hands-on role requiring strong problem-solving skills, deep coding experience, and the ability to diagnose and resolve complex production issues. Ideal candidates will be comfortable working in hybrid environments and have solid experience with cloud platforms, Kubernetes, and automation tools.

Responsibilities:•  Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve infrastructure and deployment issues across cloud and on-prem environments.•  Manage and optimize CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation using tools like Azure DevOps and Jenkins.•  Configure and maintain Kubernetes clusters, handle incident response and performance tuning.•  Design and maintain infrastructure as code using Terraform and bash scripting for cloud provisioning.•  Support both on-premises infrastructure and cloud services (hybrid model).•  Maintain software configuration management tools and establish version control best practices.•  Collaborate with developers, QA, and other DevOps engineers to ensure high system reliability and streamlined release cycles.•  Develop and implement disaster recovery strategies and backup solutions.•  Develop architectural diagrams, technical documentation, and implementation plans for Azure and Jenkins solutions, incorporating backend technologies as needed.•  Develop cloud migration strategies, including planning, execution, and troubleshooting during the transition to cloud environments.•  Embed DevOps practices into CI/CD pipelines (security scanning, dependency checks). •  Ensure compliance with security policies, regulatory requirements, and internal standards. •  Optimize infrastructure for cost, performance, and scalability (FinOps awareness).•  Use tools like Ansible for configuration management and system automation. •  Maintain consistent configurations across cloud and on-prem systems.•  Implement end-to-end observability using Open Telemetry. •  Collect and correlate logs, metrics, and traces across:     o  Azure resources     o  GitHub Actions pipelines     o  On-prem systems •  Build dashboards and alerting using tools such as Grafana, Prometheus, ELK. •  Define and track SLIs/SLOs to improve system reliability.
requirements:
•  Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, or a related field

•       English communication fluently in both speaking and writing.•  5+ years of experience as a DevOps engineer.•  Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills, effective communicator, team player, and proactive in taking ownership and driving resolution in fast-paced environments.•  Proficient in troubleshooting and debugging complex systems.•  Strong hands-on experience with Azure cloud infrastructure, particularly in hybrid (on-premises and cloud) environments.•  Strong hands-on experience with Open Telemetry and other monitoring tools.•  Skilled in automation and Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) using tools such as Terraform, CloudFormation, or ARM templates.•  Experience with Bitbucket, Jenkins, and GitHub APIs.•  Knowledgeable in containerization technologies like Docker and Kubernetes, as well as microservices architectures.

•        Having Microsoft Azure Certificates (AZ-104/AZ-305/AZ400)

Nice to have:•  Experience with:     o  Azure VM Scale Sets (VMSS)     o  Azure networking (VNet, NSG, VPN, Private Endpoints)
benefits: Further details regarding benefits will be shared during the interview process

title: [Internship] Mobile Security Engineer Intern-Forensics
label: NEW
reasons:
- Competitive Salary & internal shares program
- Annual allowances for personal development & sport
- 20 days annual leave & 5 days sick leave
jobDescription:
The Role

This is a pivotal role that places you on the front lines of protecting millions of users and our systems from sophisticated mobile fraud and adversarial attacks. As a Mobile Security Engineer Intern (Forensics) you will design, build, and operate systems that investigate, analyze, and attribute fraudulent and malicious activity across mobile platforms. This role focuses on forensic signal collection, signal integrity, attacker behavior reconstruction, and incident response on both Android and iOS environments.

You will work across the full forensic lifecycle—from secure on-device signal collection to evidence preservation, large-scale data analysis, and investigative tooling—to uncover sophisticated fraud, spoofing, and abuse. Sitting at the intersection of mobile engineering, security, data analysis, and incident response, you will help identify adversarial techniques, strengthen detection systems, and protect users at scale.Our program is designed to help you discover your potential in one of the world’s fastest-growing industries.

Key Responsibilities

- Analyze large-scale datasets and fraud incidents to uncover attack patterns, fraud clusters, and evolving adversarial behavior, including reconstructing attacker techniques and execution paths.
- Design and implement mobile SDK components to securely collect forensic-grade signals, enabling attribution of location spoofing, emulator abuse, rooted/jailbroken environments, and other environment manipulation.
- Research emerging mobile fraud and evasion techniques, translating findings into actionable forensic indicators.
- Build end-to-end incident response capabilities across the stack, partnering with Data Science and ML teams to translate forensic insights into technical features, rules, and detection logic.
requirements:
- Deep passion for investigating security incidents, hunting attackers, and uncovering sophisticated fraud, spoofing, and abuse patterns, with a strong curiosity for understanding how adversaries operate and evade defenses.
- Pursuing or recently graduated with a bachelor’s degree in Security Engineering and Computer Science or Computer Engineering or a similar field of study, with a strong academic foundation (e.g., solid understanding of data structures, algorithms, and fundamental security principles)
- Experience with data analysis (SQL, data modeling, feature extraction).
- Familiarity with data science concepts and the role of ML in detection systems
- Strong English communication skills, with the ability to clearly document findings and explain technical investigations.

Bonus Points

- Experience with mobile development (Android, iOS, or cross-platform).
- Familiarity with mobile security and forensics, including: Root / jailbreak detection and evasion techniques
- Emulator and virtualized environment detection
- Location spoofing and geolocation integrity validation
- Device attestation, TEE, Secure Enclave, and hardware-backed security
- Interest in incident response, threat research, or adversarial analysis.

Apply Now!

title: Junior Software Test Engineer
label: NEW
jobDescription:
Position Overview

We seek a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Software Test Engineer to join our QA team. In this role, you will ensure the quality and reliability of our software products through manual and automated testing, increasingly augmented by AI-powered QA tools. You will work closely with developers and other stakeholders to identify issues, report defects, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our development processes. This is an excellent opportunity to build a solid foundation in modern, AI-assisted software quality assurance and grow your technical skills.

Key Responsibilities

- Develop, execute, and maintain manual and automated test cases based on software requirements and design specifications, leveraging AI-assisted tools such as OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot to accelerate test creation and coverage.
- Perform various types of testing, including functional, regression, integration, and API testing, using AI-driven tools to identify high-risk areas and optimize test prioritization.
- Identify and document software defects, using AI tools to help generate clear, detailed bug reports that are then imported into Azure DevOps for tracking.
- Collaborate with the development team to reproduce issues and verify fixes.
- Contribute to building and maintaining automated test scripts, using OpenClaw, GitHub Copilot, and AI-powered self-healing automation to improve efficiency and reduce maintenance overhead.
- Explore and adopt emerging AI QA tools (e.g., test generation, visual regression, intelligent test analytics) and share findings with the team.
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of QA processes and methodologies.
requirements:
Qualifications and Requirements

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- Approximately 1 year of experience in Software Quality Assurance and/or software development. (Fresh graduates with relevant project experience or a strong passion for QA are also encouraged to apply.)
- Foundational understanding of software testing life cycles (STLC), testing methodologies, and best practices.
- Hands-on experience with both black-box and white-box testing techniques.
- Experience with API testing using tools like Postman or similar.
- Familiarity with defect and test management tools such as Azure DevOps, Jira, QC, or MTM.
- Openness to learning and applying AI-powered QA tools such as OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot in daily testing work.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with keen attention to detail.
- Good oral and written English communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-Have)

- Exposure to or academic project experience with test automation frameworks such as Selenium, Playwright, etc.
- Hands-on or learning experience with AI-assisted testing tools, particularly OpenClaw and GitHub Copilot.
- Basic knowledge of a programming or scripting language (e.g., Java, C#, Python, JavaScript) is a plus.

Personal Attributes

- Self-motivated and a proactive fast learner, with the ability to quickly grasp new technologies and AI tools.
- A collaborative team player with excellent interpersonal skills.
- A positive thinker with a strong sense of ownership and responsibility.
benefits:
- Working Hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Monday to Friday
- Salary: 12.000.000 - 20.000.000 (based on skills and experience)
- Coffee and tea available in the office
- The company will provide a desktop computer and other necessary work equipment
- Career development opportunities in line with the advancement of smart technology
- An open work environment with challenging projects

I. Giá trị cốt lõi

Automation

Arobid có các quy trình để giúp duy trì hiệu quả công việc cũng như sự hài lòng của nhân viên. “Tự chủ” trong nguồn nhân lực của Arobid cho phép nhân viên minh bạch và tích cực trong việc giải quyết vấn đề.

Responsibility

Nhân viên Arobid chịu trách nhiệm về công việc, hành vi, thái độ cũng như sự phát triển của chính Arobid. Sự thành công của Arobid dựa trên trách nhiệm và nỗ lực của từng cá nhân.

Open-mindedness

Tư duy cởi mở ở nhân viên của chúng tôi là quan trọng để giúp tạo điều kiện cho những thay đổi lớn và nhanh luôn xảy ra trong ngành công nghiệp công nghệ. Cũng như trong việc học hỏi những điều mới và phát triển những cách thức mới, tư duy cởi mở cũng đề cập đến việc chấp nhận sự khác biệt trong đồng nghiệp, không phân biệt giới tính, quốc tịch, tuổi tác.

Boldness

Dũng cảm, cho phép nhân viên của chúng tôi có thể mạo hiểm, thử nghiệm các phương pháp mới và độc đáo trong việc giải quyết vấn đề. Dũng cảm khác với sự liều lĩnh, dũng cảm đề cập đến các kế hoạch đã được suy nghĩ kỹ lưỡng, thử nghiệm và nghiên cứu cẩn thận và sẽ được thực hiện một cách đúng đắn.

Innovation

Sự đổi mới đề cập đến việc thúc đẩy những phương pháp mới, nhân viên tại Arobid luôn phải phát triển khả năng của bản thân, học những cách thức mới và áp dụng chúng vào công việc hàng ngày. Làm cho công việc khó khăn trở nên đơn giản và nhanh chóng hơn.

Devotion

Sự tận tâm, nhân viên Arobid coi Arobid như một nơi họ thuộc về. Tin tưởng vào sự hình thành của Arobid và mục tiêu cũng như sứ mệnh của Arobid. Cùng nhau, điều này tạo ra một mối liên kết giữa cá nhân với công ty cũng như giữa các đồng nghiệp Arobid.

II. Phúc Lợi:

- Cơ hội tiếp xúc với hàng ngàn doanh nghiệp trong nước và quốc tế.
- Thăng tiến trong nghề nghiệp chuyên môn và trong lĩnh vực Thương Mại Điện Tử.
- Cơ hội thử sức trong các lĩnh vực ngoài chuyên môn chính để phát triển bản thân.
- Thu nhập phù hợp và cơ hội tăng thu nhập như thưởng doanh số, thưởng chỉ tiêu cá nhân, thưởng nhóm, điểm thi đua, điểm cống hiến...

JOB PURPOSES

- We are looking for an AI Engineer responsible for building, operating, and improving AI models and AI-driven systems.
- The role focuses on LLM systems, model lifecycle management, data pipelines, and feedback-driven model improvement. The engineer will work with modern AI frameworks and tools to deploy, monitor, and continuously improve AI models in production environments.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Work with AI models and LLM systems and integrate them into products.
- Possess knowledge or experience with ASR/TTS models in production.
- Implement fine-tuning and feedback loop pipelines to improve model performance.
- Build RAG / GraphRAG systems using frameworks such as LangChain or LangGraph.
- Use AI agents in software development workflows and automation.
- Process and prepare datasets for model training, fine-tuning, and evaluation.
requirements:
Technical Skills

- Strong programming skills in Python.
- Hands-on experience with autonomous AI agent platforms such as Hermes and OpenClaw.
- Understanding of AI/LLM models and model deployment.
- Experience with: Fine-tuning and model improvement pipelines, RAG/GraphRAG, LangChain/ LangGraph.
- Knowledge or experience with open-source model ecosystems, such as: HuggingFace, Ollama, llama.cpp, Unsloth...
- Ability to build feedback loops for model learning and improvement.
- Experience processing data for model training or fine-tuning.
- Familiar with AI agents and AI-assisted development tools.

Nice to Have

- Experience with vector databases or knowledge systems.
- Experience deploying AI systems on cloud or GPU infrastructure.
- Experience working with open-source LLM models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen, etc.).

Language Requirement

- Good English reading skills are required, as the role involves working with AI research papers, technical documentation, and communicating in an international technical environment.
- Knowledge of Chinese (Mandarin) is a plus, particularly for candidates who can read technical materials or research documents written in Chinese.
benefits:

companyInfo.name: TRUONG MINH THINH TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK COMPANY

title: Backend Engineer (Java, Golang, Cloud, AWS, PostgreSQL)
jobDescription:
About AIRR Labs

AIRR Labs is a fast-growing E-commerce and Social Commerce company helping brands build meaningful connections with consumers across Southeast Asia.

Our Technology team develops AI-powered platforms and internal products that enable business teams to operate at scale, automate complex workflows, and drive measurable business outcomes. We are building the operational backbone of modern commerce — combining intelligent automation, scalable infrastructure, and data-driven decision-making.

As a Backend Engineer, you will play a key role in designing and building the systems that power our next generation of commerce solutions.

What You'll Do

- Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend services using Go (Golang) or Java.
- Build high-performance, event-driven microservices that support critical business workflows and large-scale transaction processing.
- Design and implement distributed systems for order management, fulfillment, and commerce operations.
- Develop and optimize cloud-native applications on AWS, ensuring reliability, scalability, and performance.
- Design and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines to support rapid and reliable software delivery.
- Collaborate on database architecture and data modeling using PostgreSQL, ensuring data integrity and system efficiency.
- Integrate with third-party platforms, APIs, and external services.
- Work closely with Product, Business, and Engineering teams to transform business requirements into scalable technical solutions.
- Continuously improve system architecture, code quality, observability, and engineering best practices.
requirements:
What We're Looking For

- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
- 2+ years of backend development experience. We are also open to exceptional early-career engineers with strong technical foundations.
- Strong proficiency in Go (Golang) or Java.
- Experience building and operating cloud-native applications on AWS.
- Solid understanding of relational databases, particularly PostgreSQL.
- Experience working with containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes.
- Familiarity with modern observability and monitoring tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki.
- Experience working with search technologies such as OpenSearch or Elasticsearch.
- Understanding of distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and high-concurrency applications.
- Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for building scalable products.
- Good English communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively within regional teams.

Nice to Have

- Experience working with workflow orchestration platforms such as Temporal.
- Experience building high-traffic, large-scale systems.
- Exposure to AI-powered development tools, AI agents, or AI-driven automation solutions.
- Experience leveraging AI technologies to improve engineering productivity, software quality, or operational efficiency.
benefits:
Why Join AIRR Labs?

- Build products that directly impact thousands of brands and consumers across Southeast Asia.
- Work on modern cloud infrastructure, distributed systems, and AI-powered solutions.
- Join a fast-growing technology team with significant ownership and autonomy.
- Collaborate with talented regional teams in a dynamic and entrepreneurial environment.

- Process customer requests related to service expansions and modifications.
- Ensure all changes are documented and implemented according to operational procedures.

3. User Onboarding & Offboarding

- Configure communication services for new employees.
- Decommission users and communication services during offboarding.
- Reassign or release phone numbers and extensions.
- Update voicemail, permissions, call forwarding, and related configurations.
- Coordinate updates with administrative, procurement, billing, and carrier systems when required.

4. Support & Incident Management

- Investigate and resolve incidents affecting UC platforms and customer environments.
- Troubleshoot SIP registration, SIP trunk, and call setup issues.
- Diagnose voice quality problems, including latency, jitter, and packet loss.
- Analyze system logs and call traces to identify root causes.
- Handle support requests and incidents through the ticketing system.
- Escalate complex issues to vendors or telecommunications carriers when necessary.
- Ensure incidents are resolved within agreed service levels (SLAs).
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Telecommunications, or a related field.
- At least 2 years of hands-on experience in Unified Communications (UC) or VoIP solutions implementation and support.
- Hands-on experience with BroadSoft and 3CX platforms.
- Knowledge of SIP, VoIP, IP Telephony, and PBX systems.
- Solid understanding of networking fundamentals, including TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, NAT, QoS, and VPN.
- Experience troubleshooting voice quality and connectivity issues, including SIP registration, call routing, and trunk connectivity.
- Familiarity with ticketing systems and incident management processes.
- Ability to analyze logs, diagnose technical issues, and perform root cause analysis.

Nice to have

- Experience with Microsoft Teams Phone or Cisco Unified Communications.
- Knowledge of SBC (Session Border Controller) and SIP trunk providers.
- Experience working in a Managed Service Provider (MSP) or telecommunications environment.
- Relevant certifications such as Cisco CCNA, Microsoft Teams Administrator, or other UC-related certifications.

What we expect from you:

Is this you?

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Customer-oriented mindset with excellent communication skills.
- Ability to prioritize tasks and work effectively under pressure.
- Strong attention to detail and documentation practices.
- Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.
- Familiarity with AI tools or willingness to adopt AI to improve work efficiency.
- Good English communication skills for technical support and collaboration.
benefits:

title: 2D Game Artist
reasons:

jobDescription:
As a 2D Game Artist, you will be responsible for creating high-quality visual assets that bring our fantasy adventure games to life. Working closely with Game Designers, Animators, and fellow Artists, you will contribute to developing a consistent and engaging visual experience that aligns with the game's artistic vision.

Key Responsibilities

- Create high-quality 2D game assets, including characters, environments, props, and UI elements, following the project's art direction and visual standards.
- Design and illustrate original concepts for characters, environments, and in-game objects that support the game's theme and narrative.
- Produce detailed concept art as well as polished production-ready assets for implementation in the game.
- Collaborate closely with Game Designers, Animators, UI/UX Designers, and other Art team members to ensure visual consistency, functionality, and overall quality.
- Develop promotional artwork and marketing materials for social media, game stores, and other communication channels.
- Optimize artwork to achieve the best balance between visual quality and game performance across multiple platforms.
- Maintain consistency with the project's art style and contribute to the continuous improvement of the game's visual identity.
- Incorporate feedback from stakeholders and iterate on artwork efficiently throughout the production process.
requirements:
- Minimum 3 years of professional experience as a 2D Game Artist or in a similar role within the game industry.
- Strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in creating high-quality 2D game art, including concept art and production-ready assets.
- Experience working on fantasy-themed games is an advantage.

Technical Skills

- Proficient in industry-standard digital art software, including Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, and Adobe After Effects.
- Strong understanding of color theory, composition, perspective, lighting, and visual storytelling.
- Ability to create both concept artwork and final production assets suitable for game development.
- Experience designing intuitive and visually appealing game UI/UX elements.
- Understanding of asset optimization techniques for different game platforms.

Soft Skills

- Strong communication and collaboration skills with the ability to work effectively in a cross-functional and remote team environment.
- Able to receive and implement feedback constructively while meeting project deadlines.
- Strong attention to detail, creativity, and problem-solving skills.
- Passion for games and a genuine interest in creating engaging player experiences.
benefits:

title: Junior Microsoft Business Central Consultant (ERP)
jobDescription:

We are looking for a Junior Functional Consultant (Microsoft Business Central)to join our Finance Transformation team. Reporting to the Finance Transformation Director, this role will be responsible for supporting internal users, ensuring consistency across entities, and proactively driving system improvements.

Key Responsibilities

User Support & Incident Management

- Analyze, troubleshoot, and resolve functional issues in a timely manner
- Manage and prioritize user requests through a ticketing system

System Standardization

Continuous Improvement

Documentation & Training

Mandatory

Preferred

Skills & Competencies

- Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks
- Proactive attitude with a continuous improvement mindset
- Team player capable of working across functions and locations
benefits:

title: AI Engineer – Generative AI & Data Processing
jobDescription:
Job Summary

We are seeking an enthusiastic AI Engineer to join our team, focusing on innovative Generative AI and Data Processing solutions. In this role, you will design, develop, and deploy advanced generative models and data-driven applications, significantly enhancing user experiences across various industries.

Key Responsibilities

- Research, develop, and deploy scalable Generative AI models and data processing solutions.
- Integrate advanced Large Language Models (LLMs), diffusion models, and multimodal generative AI techniques into practical applications.
- Collaborate with software engineering teams to convert AI prototypes into robust, production-ready systems.
- Optimize and fine-tune AI models for improved performance, accuracy, and efficiency.
- Perform comprehensive evaluations and benchmarking of AI agents to ensure high-quality, reliable results.
- Continuously research emerging trends and technologies in AI, machine learning, and generative methods.
requirements:
Qualifications

- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields.
- +2 years of experience in developing and deploying generative AI models (e.g., GPT, Stable Diffusion, Transformer architectures).
- Practical knowledge of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) methods and Vector Databases.
- Familiarity with Python and popular deep learning frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, and Hugging Face.
- Experience with cloud services (AWS, GCP) and modern MLOps practices.
- Hands-on experience with embedding technologies and LLM like OpenAI API, Gemini API, and Anthropic API.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a passion for innovation.

Preferred Skills

- Experience with AI model optimization techniques, including quantization, pruning, and fine-tuning.
- Familiarity with deploying AI models using Kubernetes or similar container orchestration platforms.
- Excellent communication skills and the ability to effectively collaborate within interdisciplinary teams.
benefits:
- Working time: 8:30AM - 5:30PM, Monday to Friday (flexible hours as long as productivity is ensured).
- Remote work policy allows up to 2 days per week.
- Review salary every 6 months, 13th-month salary and receive a benefit bonus twice a year.

title: (Mid/Senior) Business Analyst (ERP/ Odoo)
company: Công ty cổ phần giải pháp chuyển đổi số THG
jobDescription:
Business Analyst là cầu nối giữa khách hàng và đội kỹ thuật (Dev, Test, Designer), giữ vai trò trung tâm trong quy trình triển khai ERP của THG. Vị trí này chịu trách nhiệm làm rõ yêu cầu, thiết kế giải pháp nghiệp vụ trên nền tảng Odoo và các ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp (HRM, MES/sản xuất, Kho/WMS, Kế toán – Tài chính, Mua hàng, Bán hàng/CRM…), đồng thời chủ trì nghiệm thu (UAT) cùng khách hàng.

- Khảo sát, tiếp nhận và làm rõ yêu cầu của khách hàng cho các dự án ERP/Odoo và ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp.
- Phân tích, mô hình hóa quy trình nghiệp vụ hiện tại (As-is) và thiết kế quy trình mục tiêu (To-be); đề xuất giải pháp tối ưu trên Odoo.
- Biên soạn tài liệu phân tích: đặc tả yêu cầu (SRS/FRS), user story, use case, sơ đồ quy trình (BPMN/UML), prototype/wireframe.
- Làm đầu mối trao đổi giữa khách hàng và đội Dev/Test/Designer; làm rõ yêu cầu, kiểm soát và xử lý thay đổi (change request) trong suốt vòng đời dự án.
- Chủ trì nghiệm thu (UAT): xây dựng kịch bản nghiệm thu, hướng dẫn khách hàng kiểm thử trên môi trường staging và lấy xác nhận (sign-off) bàn giao.
- Tư vấn nghiệp vụ trên góc độ giải pháp ERP; đề xuất cải tiến quy trình và khai thác tính năng sẵn có của Odoo trước khi customize.
- Hỗ trợ pre-sales: khảo sát nhu cầu, demo sản phẩm, xây dựng đề xuất giải pháp và ước lượng phạm vi (scope/estimate).
- Viết tài liệu hướng dẫn sử dụng (user manual), đào tạo người dùng cuối và hỗ trợ go-live.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý, Kinh tế, Quản trị kinh doanh hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 3 - 5 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí Business Analyst, trong đó có kinh nghiệm BA cho ERP hoặc ứng dụng quản trị doanh nghiệp.
- Hiểu sâu nghiệp vụ ít nhất một vài phân hệ: HRM, MES/Sản xuất, Kho/WMS, Kế toán – Tài chính, Mua hàng, Bán hàng/CRM.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên đã từng làm BA cho Odoo (hoặc ERP tương đương: SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Bravo, MISA AMIS…).
- Thành thạo công cụ mô hình hóa và quản lý tài liệu: BPMN/UML, Figma/draw.io, Jira/Confluence hoặc tương đương.
- Biết viết user story và tiêu chí nghiệm thu (acceptance criteria); quen làm việc theo Agile/Scrum là lợi thế.
- Kỹ năng phân tích, giao tiếp, thuyết trình và quản lý yêu cầu (requirement management) tốt; chủ động, cẩn thận, định hướng khách hàng.
- Đọc hiểu tốt tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh.
- Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ liên quan: IIBA (ECBA/CCBA/CBAP), Odoo Functional Certification hoặc tương đương.
benefits:
- Mức lương 15 – 35 triệu, thỏa thuận theo năng lực và kinh nghiệm; xét tăng lương định kỳ.
- Thưởng lễ Tết, lương tháng 13.
- Thưởng theo hiệu quả dự án và mức độ đóng góp.
- Đóng BHXH, BHYT, BHTN đầy đủ theo quy định.
- Tham gia xây dựng quy trình phát triển phần mềm ERP ứng dụng AI – môi trường công nghệ hiện đại, làm việc trực tiếp với khách hàng doanh nghiệp.
- Lộ trình phát triển rõ ràng: Senior BA / BA Lead / Solution Consultant; được đào tạo chuyên môn và nghiệp vụ ERP.
- Các chế độ phúc lợi khác theo quy định công ty (du lịch, team building, nghỉ phép…).

title: Application Developer (Python, SQL, MySQL)
company: Công Ty Cổ Phần Thuận Hải
jobDescription:
1. Nghiên cứu & đề xuất công nghệ:

- Tìm hiểu các công nghệ, công cụ và xu hướng phần mềm mới nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả phát triển và vận hành phần mềm nội bộ.
- Đề xuất giải pháp phần mềm nhằm tối ưu quy trình và đáp ứng nhu cầu vận hành của Công ty.

2. Phân tích & phát triển phần mềm:

- Phối hợp với chuyên viên BA để tiếp nhận, làm rõ và phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ.
- Thiết kế và lập trình các ứng dụng phần mềm, ứng dụng di động, hệ thống tích hợp CNTT.
- Hợp tác với quản trị hệ thống để triển khai phần mềm trên hệ thống server.

3. Hỗ trợ vận hành & nâng cấp hệ thống:

- Xử lý các lỗi, sự cố trong quá trình sử dụng phần mềm.

requirements:
1. Trình độ học vấn: Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan.

2. Kiến thức chuyên môn:

- Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp hệ thống qua API.

3. Kỹ năng bổ trợ:

- Tư duy phân tích hệ thống, thiết kế kiến trúc phần mềm.

4. Kinh nghiệm làm việc:

- Có khả năng xử lý lượng dữ liệu lớn, tối ưu hiệu năng phần mềm.
benefits:
