title: DevSecOps Engineer II (Cloud Security, Kubernetes)
reasons:
- Super App
- High Traffic
- Big Scale
jobDescription:
In this role, you will be responsible for integrating security practices into our DevOps processes, ensuring that our software is both secure and delivered efficiently. As a DevSecOps Engineer, you will work closely with development, operations, and security teams to automate security measures, conduct vulnerability assessments, and respond to security incidents in real-time. This role offers the opportunity to make a significant impact on our company's security posture and contribute to the development of innovative solutions.

Job Description

- Integrate security best practices into the DevOps pipeline, ensuring secure software delivery.
- Conduct regular vulnerability assessments and provide recommendations for remediation.
- Collaborate with development, operations, and security teams to design and implement security solutions.
- Automate security processes, including vulnerability scanning and incident response.
- Monitor security metrics and prepare reports for stakeholders.
- Stay up-to-date with the latest security trends, threats, and technologies.
- Respond to security incidents and lead post-incident investigations.
- Provide training and guidance to team members on security best practices.
requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Security, or a related field.
- Proven experience in a DevSecOps or related role.
- Proficiency in security and DevOps tools such as Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and security scanning tools.
- Strong understanding of cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP) and their security features.
- Experience with automation and scripting languages (e.g., Python, Bash).
- Familiarity with continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD) pipelines.
- Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Strong communication and leadership abilities.
- DevOps and Security Tools: Proficiency in tools such as Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes, and security scanning tools.
- Vulnerability Assessment: Experience in identifying and mitigating security vulnerabilities.
- Security Integration: Ability to embed security protocols into the DevOps pipeline.
- Incident Response: Skills in responding to and managing security incidents.
- Automation: Expertise in automating security processes and integrating them into CI/CD pipelines.
benefits:
We are passion with new technologies, not follow the old-track of outsourcing. We love our product and ready to sacrifice everything for it! You often argue with your boss? Don’t worry, here in M_Service, you will get salary increase if you win your boss in argument. We love objection!!! You hate company trip in hotel, resort? We only conquer difficult and hottest road in team building. Do you want to join?

What you will get:

- Competitive compensation package.
- Performance-based bonus.
- Insurance package.
- Chance to work with smart people with international experience.

Our benefits:

- Attractive compensation & benefits.
- 13th month salary bonus and yearly performance bonus.
- 14 paid days off per year
- Premium health care insurance
- Great allowances (lunch, parking, birthday, happy hours....)
- Salary review at least one time per year based on employee's performance and contribution.
- Outing/team-building activities (company trip , soccer sport, english club, running club,..).
- Other benefits as per stated in Vietnamese Labor Law
- Work with experienced & strong team.
- Friendly, dynamic & flexible working environments.

title: Senior Data Security - Data Division
reasons:
- Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn
- Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện
- Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến
jobDescription:
2026TD450980 - Chuyên viên cao cấp Bảo mật dữ liệu - Khối Dữ liệu

1. Mục tiêu công việc:

- Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến xây dựng và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu, đảm bảo an toàn, tuân thủ và bảo vệ dữ liệu trong suốt vòng đời, theo quy định pháp luật và tiêu chuẩn quốc tế (Nghị định 13/2023/NĐ-CP, ISO 27001, GDPR...).- Phối hợp với các đơn vị Quản trị dữ liệu, An ninh thông tin, Rủi ro và Tuân thủ để triển khai hiệu quả các chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn và công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu trong phạm vi được phân công, góp phần đảm bảo hoạt động quản trị dữ liệu toàn hàng được vận hành liên tục, an toàn và hiệu quả.2. Nhiệm vụ/trách nhiệm chính:i. Thiết kế và triển khai Data Security Framework thống nhất trên toàn tổ chức.ii. Quản lý các hoạt động bảo mật dữ liệu theo vòng đời dữ liệu (data lifecycle):• Phân loại và gắn nhãn dữ liệu (Data Classification & Tagging)• Mã hóa và quản lý khóa (Encryption & Key Management)• Ẩn danh, che dấu dữ liệu (Masking, Tokenization)• Quản lý truy cập và phân quyền (Access Control, IAM, ABAC/RBAC)• Giám sát và phát hiện rò rỉ dữ liệu (DLP, Monitoring, Incident Response)iii. Xây dựng và cập nhật chính sách, quy trình, tiêu chuẩn bảo mật dữ liệu, phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị IT Security, Data Governance, QTRR và Tuân thủ.iv. Tham gia triển khai, đánh giá và kiểm soát tuân thủ các quy định pháp luật về bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân và bảo mật thông tin.v. Đào tạo, nâng cao nhận thức về bảo mật dữ liệu cho các đơn vị kinh doanh và kỹ thuật.vi. Xây dựng báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình an ninh dữ liệu, cảnh báo sớm rủi ro và kế hoạch cải thiện cho Ban Lãnh đạo.
requirements:
i. Trình độ & kinh nghiệm• Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành CNTT, An toàn thông tin, Khoa học dữ liệu, hoặc tương đương.• Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm trong các lĩnh vực: Information Security, Data Governance, IT Risk, hoặc Cloud Security.• Hiểu biết về các tiêu chuẩn và khung kiểm soát bảo mật dữ liệu: ISO 27001/27701, NIST, GDPR, PCI-DSS, Decree 13/2023/NĐ-CP.• Có kinh nghiệm triển khai hoặc quản lý các công cụ bảo mật dữ liệu: DLP, Data Masking, Encryption, IAM, SIEM, Key Vault, Cloud Security Tools.ii. Kỹ năng• Khả năng thiết kế và triển khai cơ chế bảo mật dữ liệu ở cấp tổ chức.• Tư duy data-centric security, cân bằng giữa bảo mật và hiệu quả kinh doanh.• Kỹ năng điều phối liên phòng ban, giao tiếp tốt, và ra quyết định nhanh trong tình huống sự cố.• Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ quốc tế: CISSP, CISM, CDPSE, ISO 27001 LA/LI, CDMP Practitioner, CISA.• SQL, các công cụ BI

title: Core System Operation Associate (IT Support/Securities)
company: Công ty Cổ phần Chứng khoán KIS Việt Nam
reasons:
- Professional working environment, foreign language
- Knowlegde in Securities/Finance/Bank progamming
- Oppornities to learn about Securities Market
jobDescription:
About us: KIS Vietnam Securities Corporation (KIS Vietnam) was established in December 2010 by Korea Investment & Securities Co., Ltd. (KIS), Vietnam National Textile and Garment Group and other shareholders. KIS Korea contributed 48.8% of the capital in KIS Vietnam in November 2010 and officially raised its ownership to 92.3% in January 2014. As of June 2021, KIS Vietnam increased its charter capital to VND 4,550 billion.

KIS Vietnam is the local securities arm of KIS, the largest securities company in Korea by equity. KIS Vietnam provides comprehensive range of financial services including securities brokerage, margin lending, institutional services, derivatives and investment banking.

We are proud to be one of the significant players in the Vietnamese financial market and we believe that our employees are the key factor that creates the prestige and success of KIS Vietnam.

Responsibilities:

- Monitor, operate, and check the daily operational status of the TTL Core system.
- Perform system checks before market opening, during trading sessions, after trading sessions, and at end of day.
- Check the status of key system components, including FO, BO, DBSync, HOSE/HNX Gateway, MDS, API Server, VSD Gateway, Bank Gateway, Report Engine, and other related services.
- Check processes, services, listening ports, application connectivity, database connectivity, connectivity to Stock Exchanges, VSDC, banks, and internal systems.
- Monitor system logs, ERROR logs, EXCEPTION logs, and alerts to detect abnormalities at an early stage.
- Perform or verify key operation steps such as Day Start, Day End, Advance System Date, Order Expiration, Trade Export, Interface Import, Contract Generation, Contract Matching, pending transaction checking, and related batch jobs.
- Receive, analyze, and handle requests, errors, or incidents related to the Core system from users and business departments.
- Coordinate with TTL, DBA, Infrastructure, Network, Security, Online Trading, and related business units to resolve incidents, verify data, deploy patches, or implement system changes.
- Support users in using the Core system, checking business errors, verifying data, and coordinating the handling of arising requests.
- Participate in UAT, Production deployment, post-deployment checking, checklist preparation, and rollback support when required.
- Update new requirements and regulations from SSC, HOSE, HNX, and VSDC, and coordinate with relevant parties to assess their impact on the Core system.
- Record operation logs, prepare incident reports, identify root causes, and propose preventive actions to avoid recurrence.
requirements:
- Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or other related fields.
- Minimum 2–3 years of experience in application operation, system operation, or support for financial business systems.
- Candidates with experience working in securities companies, banks, or financial institutions are preferred.
- Strong preference will be given to candidates with experience operating securities Core systems in Vietnam; experience with TTL Core / WinVest / InvestNet is a significant advantage.
- Basic knowledge of Linux/Unix/AIX, Windows Server, database, and SQL.
- Able to check processes, ports, services, system connectivity, application logs, and business-related errors.
- Basic understanding of securities trading, orders, order matching, settlement, depository operations, market data, end-of-day batch jobs, and data reconciliation.
- Able to work with checklists, follow procedures, prepare clear reports, and analyze issues logically.
- Careful, able to work under pressure during trading hours, and willing to provide support outside office hours when incidents or system deployments occur.

Working time and location:

• Time: Mon to Fri, 8AM-5PM

• Location: Level 3, TNR building, 180-192 Nguyen Cong Tru, Ben Thanh Ward, HCMC

Due to the high volume of applications, we regret that only candidates who meet the position requirements will be contacted. We appreciate your interest in this opportunity.
benefits:
- Competitive salary based on experience and capabilities.
- 13th monthly salary and attractive annual performance bonus.
- Monthly awards for outstanding employees.
- Social insurance contributions based on full salary.
- Individual health insurance card (if eligible).
- Free parking for all employees and phone allowance (if eligible).
- Quarterly team-building allowances per department
- Top performers have the opportunity to visit the company’s headquarters in South Korea, with annual organized trips.
- 100% tuition support for professional certifications (brokerage, analysis, fund management), language courses, and specialized training programs annually.
- Direct training and mentorship from experienced industry professionals.
- Opportunities to participate in workshops and professional events to enhance knowledge and stay updated on market trends.
- Expand your professional network and develop a long-term career in the securities industry.
- Annual health check-ups, company trips, and other engagement activities.

title: Full-Stack QC Engineer (Manual + Automation Test)
reasons:
- English Working Environment
- Challenging Projects
- Summer Week-Off
jobDescription:
About the role

We’re looking for a Full-stack/ Manual QC Engineer (Middle / Senior Level) who is passionate about software quality and eager to grow in both manual and automation testing.

You’ll work closely with developers, designers, and product stakeholders to ensure high-quality delivery across web and mobile products.

What you’ll do

- Be involved in refining requirements and clarifying acceptance criteria with stakeholders
- Take ownership of testing scope within a feature or sprint
- Design, write, and execute test cases (manual and automation)
- Perform functional, regression, integration, and exploratory testing
- Develop and maintain automation test scripts for regression and functional testing
- Identify, log, and track bugs; support troubleshooting with developers
- Ensure product quality through post-release validation and monitoring
- Participate in Agile/Scrum ceremonies (planning, daily, retrospective)
- Contribute to test strategy, test planning, and quality improvements
- Continuously improve testing processes, tools, and frameworks
- Apply a security mindset during testing and quality assurance activities
requirements:
- 3+ years of experience in manual testing and 1+ year of experience for automation
- Experience leading a QC team or strong leadership potential.
- Solid understanding of SDLC and software testing methodologies
- Hands-on experience in: Writing test cases and test plans Bug tracking and reporting
- Writing test cases and test plans
- Bug tracking and reporting
- Experience in automation testing: Playwright, Cypress or have at least 1 year of experience with TypeScript
- Familiarity with API testing tools (Postman or similar)
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum teams
- Good logical thinking and problem-solving skills
- Ability to work independently and manage priorities effectively
- Good English communication for working directly with clients

Nice to have

- Experience with CI/CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
- Knowledge of programming or scripting (Java, Python, C#, etc.)
- Experience in mobile testing (iOS/Android)
- Exposure to cloud platforms or microservices architecture
- ISTQB or other testing certifications
benefits:
- Career Development
- English working environment
- Training opportunities
- Work-life balance: 40 hours per week from Monday to Friday, 17 days off and 12 work-from-home days per year
- Competitive salary and benefits: 13th salary, profit sharing, bonus for excellent members
- Full salary during probation period
- Contribute 100% of gross salary to Social Insurance
- Monthly lunch and gasoline allowances
- Company healthcare budget
- Annual healthcare check
- Annual company trip
- Monthly & annually company events to engage and connect with team members

title: AI Engineer
jobDescription:
About the Role

Our team is becoming an AI-native decision-intelligence function. We're hiring an AI Engineer to design and build intelligent experiences on top of the Data & Intelligence Foundation — agentic workflows, natural-language query, automation, and programmatic access patterns.

You'll do more than experiment with AI tools. You'll ship reliable, secure, governed AI capabilities that let stakeholders reach trusted insights without depending only on static dashboards. The ideal candidate blends AI application development with enterprise data-governance awareness.

Key Responsibilities

·  Design AI-native experiences for interacting with data via natural language, agents, assistant-style interfaces, and programmatic/CLI access.

·  Build prototypes and production workflows for KPI lookup, report-health checks, quality validation, insight routing, and stakeholder self-service.

·  Partner with Data Engineers to ground AI experiences in trusted semantic models and governed data assets.

·  Work with Business Analysts to encode business context, metric interpretation, ontology, and guardrails into AI experiences.

·  Support AI-native skilling and engineering practices, including human-in-the-loop needs and capability gaps.

·  Drive automation opportunities such as reporting automation, alert/response, validation, and insight routing.

·  Apply responsible AI, security, entitlement, and governance principles throughout.

·  Define reusable architecture patterns for AI-enabled decision intelligence.
requirements:
Must-Have Qualifications

Core requirements:

·  Excellent English communication — able to clearly understand spoken and written English, and express ideas and collaborate in confident, fluent, and precise English.

·  Growth mindset and drive — eager to learn and improve, proactive and self-motivated, self-critical and open to feedback, while inclusive and self-assured.

·  Alignment and reliable execution — stays aligned with company and team strategy and roadmap, and dependably executes and delivers on commitments.

Role-specific:

·  A solid software engineering foundation — system design, data structures, concurrency, error handling, and building services that are reliable in production. You treat AI systems with the same engineering rigor as any other software you ship.

· Strong programming skills, ideally in Python and/or TypeScript/C#. You're comfortable working close to the metal — for example, implementing a tool-calling loop yourself rather than depending on a framework to handle it for you.

· Practical experience building AI applications, agents, assistants, or LLM-integrated workflows, and the ability to clearly explain what you built, the decisions you made, and what you'd do differently next time.

· A real grasp of the fundamentals beneath the frameworks: how APIs, backend services, and orchestration fit together; how prompts and context are structured and managed within a model's limits; and how tool/function calling works.

· The ability to debug and evaluate AI systems — to figure out why a model's output is wrong, and to measure whether a change genuinely improved things rather than relying on gut feel.

· Awareness of cost, latency, and reliability trade-offs, and the judgment to choose the simplest approach that solves the problem well.

· Good instincts for matching the technique to the problem — retrieval, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or plain function calling — based on what the work actually needs.

Experience-to-Have

· Experience with the Microsoft technology stack (e.g. .NET/C#, Azure, Azure OpenAI, Microsoft Fabric).

· Data engineering skills are a big plus — dimensional modeling (star and snowflake schemas), ETL pipelines, and working with big data.

· Familiarity with enterprise data platforms and semantic layers.

· Experience designing AI systems that are grounded, explainable, permission-aware, and aligned with governed data sources.

· Standard engineering practice: Git, CI/CD, testing, logging, monitoring, and deployment.
benefits:
- Innovative Work Culture: Join a team where creativity and innovation are at the heart of everything we do. Our IT company thrives on new ideas, and we foster a collaborative environment where every voice is valued and heard. You'll have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects that push the boundaries of technology.
- Career Growth & Learning Opportunities: We believe in the power of continuous learning. Whether it’s through mentorship, online courses, or access to industry conferences, we provide the tools you need to grow professionally. You’ll have opportunities to learn and advance in your career, all while working with some of the best minds in the industry.
- Flexible Work Environment: Work-life balance is key. We offer flexible hours and a supportive environment that adapts to your needs. Whether you're a night owl or an early bird, we trust our employees to manage their time in a way that allows for both productivity and personal time.
- Collaborative Team Spirit: We know that great things happen when people come together. Our teams are diverse, inclusive, and driven to succeed. From brainstorming sessions to cross-departmental collaboration, you’ll work with talented individuals who are passionate about what they do.

title: Chuyên viên bảo mật ứng dụng
jobDescription:
Chuyên viên Bảo mật Ứng dụng chịu trách nhiệm triển khai, giám sát và nâng cao mức độ an toàn bảo mật cho các hệ thống ứng dụng của Công ty trong toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển và vận hành, nhằm giảm thiểu rủi ro an ninh thông tin, bảo đảm tuân thủ các tiêu chuẩn và yêu cầu pháp lý liên quan. Cụ thể:

- Thực hiện đánh giá an ninh đối với luồng ứng dụng, luồng tích hợp hệ thống; đề xuất và triển khai các điểm kiểm soát (security controls) đối với kết nối giữa các hệ thống và ứng dụng.
- Thực hiện giám sát, phát hiện, đánh giá và kiểm soát các lỗ hổng, điểm yếu bảo mật của hệ thống và ứng dụng; phối hợp với các đơn vị liên quan để xây dựng và triển khai phương án khắc phục.
- Đóng vai trò đầu mối tiếp nhận, tổng hợp và báo cáo các lỗ hổng, điểm yếu bảo mật tới các đơn vị liên quan; theo dõi và giám sát tiến độ khắc phục theo quy định.
- Xây dựng kế hoạch và tổ chức thực hiện các hoạt động dò quét, đánh giá và kiểm soát lỗ hổng bảo mật ứng dụng định kỳ và đột xuất.
- Tham gia trực tiếp hoặc phối hợp thực hiện khắc phục các lỗ hổng, điểm yếu bắt buộc theo các tiêu chuẩn và thông lệ như PCI-DSS, OWASP và các yêu cầu tuân thủ liên quan.
- Đảm bảo các hoạt động phát triển ứng dụng và hạ tầng CNTT tuân thủ các quy trình, tiêu chuẩn an toàn thông tin đã được thiết lập; tham gia đánh giá an ninh trong các giai đoạn thiết kế, phát triển, kiểm thử và triển khai.
- Phối hợp với các đơn vị nghiệp vụ, nhóm phát triển và nhóm hạ tầng trong việc hoàn thiện giải pháp, tính năng sản phẩm, bảo đảm yếu tố an toàn thông tin được tích hợp ngay từ giai đoạn thiết kế (Security by Design).
- Tham gia xây dựng và triển khai các chương trình đào tạo, truyền thông và các chiến dịch giả lập nhằm đánh giá và nâng cao nhận thức an toàn thông tin cho người dùng nội bộ.
- Thường xuyên nghiên cứu, cập nhật và phân tích các lỗ hổng bảo mật mới, các kỹ thuật tấn công và cơ chế bảo mật ứng dụng hiện đại; đề xuất áp dụng phù hợp với hệ thống của Công ty.
- Thực hiện các nhiệm vụ khác theo phân công của cấp quản lý.
requirements:
- Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên các chuyên ngành An toàn thông tin, Công nghệ thông tin hoặc các chuyên ngành liên quan.
- Có khả năng nghiên cứu, đọc hiểu và sử dụng tài liệu kỹ thuật chuyên ngành bằng tiếng Anh.
- Có kiến thức nền tảng về các lỗ hổng bảo mật ứng dụng, phương pháp đánh giá và giải pháp khắc phục.
- Có hiểu biết và khả năng làm việc với ít nhất một trong các ngôn ngữ lập trình hoặc nền tảng ứng dụng như PHP, .NET, Python, Java; sẵn sàng tìm hiểu và tiếp cận các công nghệ, ngôn ngữ mới.
- Có tinh thần trung thực, chủ động, sáng tạo trong công việc; khả năng làm việc độc lập và chịu được áp lực cao.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên đã tham gia các dự án, nghiên cứu liên quan đến phát hiện, đánh giá và khắc phục lỗ hổng bảo mật ứng dụng, website.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm hoặc hiểu biết về nghiệp vụ chứng khoán, tài chính – ngân hàng.
- Ưu tiên ứng viên có các chứng chỉ hoặc kiến thức về bảo mật ứng dụng và tiêu chuẩn an toàn thông tin (ví dụ: OWASP, PCI-DSS, CEH, Security+).
benefits:
- Thu nhập bao gồm lương cứng và thu nhập bổ sung theo kết quả kinh doanh của Công ty.
- Các chế độ phúc lợi:Được hưởng các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, Bảo hiểm sức khỏe, khám bệnh định kỳ, …Được thưởng và hưởng các chế độ phúc lợi theo quy định của Công ty: Du lịch hàng năm tại khu nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao; hỗ trợ chi phí đào tạo, đi lại, xăng xe, điện thoại,…Có nhiều cơ hội thăng tiến, được tạo điều kiện tối đa để phát huy hết khả năng. Môi trường làm việc thân thiện, chuyên nghiệp, năng động
- Được hưởng các chế độ BHXH, BHYT, Bảo hiểm sức khỏe, khám bệnh định kỳ, …
- Được thưởng và hưởng các chế độ phúc lợi theo quy định của Công ty: Du lịch hàng năm tại khu nghỉ dưỡng 5 sao; hỗ trợ chi phí đào tạo, đi lại, xăng xe, điện thoại,…

title: Senior .NET Back-end Developer (C#, API, Microservices)
reasons:
- Young and fast grow
- Attractive salary, Full insurance package
- Global training (United State, Korea)
jobDescription:
EMCT focuses on digital transformation solutions for utility systems in buildings and factories, especially remote fire monitoring and control services that apply advanced digital technologies to protect lives and assets. We provide intelligent, real-time fire safety solutions for businesses and facilities across South Korea, United States, Vietnam, and other countries. Our mission is to combine advanced software platforms with strict safety standards to create a safer environment through innovation.We are currently building our core product engineering team and are looking for a Senior Backend .NET Developer to join us. In this role, you will play a key part in developing both our ERP/SaaS systems and our core IoT platform for smart buildings.

Key Responsibilities:

- Develop, maintain, and enhance backend services for Saas and ERP systems
- Implement and optimize finance-related business logic
- Build and expose RESTful APIs consumed by frontend and client applications
- Ensure data integrity and system performance across core business workflows
- Build scalable, real-time backend services for IoT and smart building solutions
- Develop WebSocket-based communication layers for device data streaming
- Design and maintain APIs for integration with IoT devices and third-party systems
- Optimize system performance and reliability at scale
- Collaborate with frontend and client app teams on integration
requirements:
- 7+ years of experience in software development, with a strong focus on backend/server-side
- Expert-level proficiency in C# / .NET
- Solid experience with ASP.NET Core and building RESTful APIs
- Experience with EF Core or equivalent ORM
- Experience with relational databases (query optimization, schema design)
- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently
- Experience in SaaS / ERP / IoT is a strong plus
- Experience with real-time systems and WebSocket
- Knowledge of Microservices, Kafka, gRPC
- Exposure to IoT systems and Linux environments
- Familiarity with WPF / MAUI / WinForms for integration purposes
- Able to communicate fluently in English, especially in verbal communication.
benefits:
Company Culture:

- International work environment with real career advancement opportunities.
- Business Trip: Opportunity to travel around the world and make important contributions to useful solutions for life.
- Snacks & drinks provided at the office.

Salary and Benefits:

- Competitive Salary
- Comprehensive Benefits: social insurance, a 13th-month bonus,12 days of annual leave, and Vietnamese public holidays.
- Welcome party, birthdays, weddings, funerals, additional annual leave after 3 years of employment, etc.

- Hợp tác với CTO Hàn - mở rộng tầm nhìn kỹ thuật
requirements:
Yêu cầu cơ bản:

- Kinh nghiệm: Có 3~5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm, tư duy full-stack nhưng có chuyên môn sâu về Backend (Node.js, Python, hoặc các ngôn ngữ server-side mạnh mẽ).
- Năng lực Machine Learning: Có kinh nghiệm thực chiến trong việc thiết kế, xây dựng và tối ưu các pipeline ML. Thành thạo xử lý dữ liệu (data wrangling/feature engineering) cho các bài toán phân loại (classification), dự báo (forecasting) và phát hiện bất thường (anomaly detection).
- Năng lực Computer Vision: Am hiểu về xử lý hình ảnh/video, nhận diện vật thể, trích xuất dữ liệu từ hình ảnh (OCR/Metadata extraction) và các kỹ thuật liên quan đến phân tích hành vi.
- Kinh nghiệm LLM & NLP: Có khả năng ứng dụng các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLM) vào sản phẩm thực tế. Thành thạo Prompt Engineering, fine-tuning cơ bản, kỹ thuật RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) và xử lý đầu ra có cấu trúc (Structured Output/JSON) để tích hợp vào hệ thống backend.
- Cơ sở dữ liệu: Nắm vững tư duy thiết kế Database (Relational DB như PostgreSQL/MySQL), tối ưu hóa truy vấn, cấu trúc index và quản lý dữ liệu hiệu quả.
- Tiếng Anh: Trình độ Business (đọc hiểu tài liệu chuyên môn, làm việc và giao tiếp được bằng tiếng Anh).

Ưu tiên:

- AI-Native: Đã từng phát triển sản phẩm end-to-end bằng các AI coding agent (như Claude Code / Codex / Cursor).
- Kinh nghiệm triển khai: Đã từng đưa các hệ thống AI/ML/Agent lên môi trường production thực tế và tối ưu hiệu năng.
- Tư duy hệ thống: Có khả năng thiết kế hệ thống backend có khả năng mở rộng (scalability) cao, giải quyết các bài toán về latency và data throughput.
- Portfolio: Cung cấp được một dự án AI/ML/CV bạn đã tự mình launching từ 0→1.
- Có khả năng giao tiếp tốt với PM và design về business.
- Càng có nhiều kinh nghiệm thực hiện các dự án về ứng dụng AI thì càng được ưu tiên.

title: Middle QA/QC Engineer (Automation)
reasons:
- Compensation, Benefits & Well-being
- Growth, Learning & Personal Development
- Flexible Work, Culture & Everyday Experience
jobDescription:
Role Summary

We are looking for a Middle QA/QC Engineer to own the quality of applications and technical solutions built in-house. Beyond functional testing, you will design test strategy, build and maintain automation frameworks (API & Web & App), and work closely with developers to ship reliable, well-tested products. This role requires a development background — you should be comfortable reading code, understanding system architecture, and writing test scripts.

Key Responsibilities

- Analyze specs, requirements, and system architecture to design comprehensive test plans and test cases.
- Perform testing across multiple layers: functional, integration, API, regression, e2e and basic performance/load.
- Design, build, and maintain automation test frameworks for API (Postman/REST) and Web (Playwright/Cypress).
- Integrate automated tests into the CI/CD pipeline and maintain them as the product evolves.
- Read application code to understand logic, reproduce and diagnose defects, and verify fixes together with developers.
- Track and report quality metrics (defect density, test coverage, pass rate, escape rate).
- Contribute to QA process, standards, and test documentation
requirements:
Requirements

- [1+] years of QA/QC experience, with [2+] years in working as Developer.

- Proficient in at least one programming language ([JavaScript/TypeScript, Golang]).
- Strong hands-on experience with API testing (Postman / REST) — request design, assertions, environments, collections.
- Hands-on experience building Web automation with Playwright and/or Cypress.
- Solid understanding of system architecture, HTTP/APIs, and how distributed/backend services work.
- Experience integrating tests into CI/CD (e.g. GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins).

benefits: We offer a competitive compensation structure, including annual salary reviews, performance bonuses, and a profit-sharing bonus tied to both individual contributions and company growth. Our benefits package covers national insurance, communication and transportation allowances, as well as generous subsidies for annual professional health checkups —so you can focus on your work with peace of mind.

title: Mid-Senior Java Backend Developer (Spring, English)
reasons:
- 13th - Month, 14th - Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- 100% Salary Insurance Contribution
- Team Building Budget for each Quater
jobDescription:
We're looking for an experienced Mid-Senior Backend Java Engineer to join our team. In this role, you'll be a key player in designing, implementing, and optimizing our backend systems and services. You'll work on complex distributed systems, contribute to architectural decisions, and help mentor junior team members, all while driving high-quality code and project outcomes.

What You'll Be Doing

- System Design & Development: Lead the analysis and design of complex systems and API services. You'll be responsible for the full development lifecycle, from concept to deployment.
- Code Quality & Maintenance: Write robust unit and integration tests to ensure the accuracy and reliability of our services. You'll also participate in code reviews to maintain high standards and help colleagues grow.
- Architectural Leadership: Design and implement distributed computing services and propose improvements to existing system architecture. Your insights will be crucial in areas like index strategies, query optimization, and Redis data structures.
- Project Ownership: Take full ownership of project requirements, from clarifying ambiguities with stakeholders to decomposing projects into actionable tasks and coordinating with other teams.
- Team & Process Improvement: Actively identify opportunities for system optimization and process improvements. You will contribute to refining team culture, development workflows, and engineering best practices.
- Mentorship & Collaboration: Collaborate with cross-functional teams (Product, Frontend, QA, IT) and provide mentorship and technical guidance to more junior team members.
requirements:
Required Skills & Experience

- Experience: A minimum of 3 years of professional experience in software development.
- Proficiency: Deep expertise in Java, including the Spring Framework, and proficiency in Shell scripting.
- System Design: Proven experience in designing and implementing distributed services and applying design patterns.
- Database Skills: Strong command of SQL syntax and an understanding of database normalization.
- Tools & Technologies: Hands-on experience with Redis and familiarity with the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).
- Testing: Experience in writing effective unit tests is essential.
- Soft Skills: You should be a proactive problem-solver with a tenacious attitude, excellent communication skills (English or Chinese) for both written and speaking, and the ability to articulate technical decisions clearly. Willingness to engage in pair programming is also required.

What We Offer

This role offers a clear path for growth and increasing impact within our team.

- First 3-6 Months: You will onboard, get familiar with our tech stack and workflows, and begin taking responsibility for product optimization and routine maintenance. You'll start tackling more complex technical requirements.
- Beyond 6 Months: You'll transition into leading core development tasks, contributing significantly to system architecture, and mentoring newer team members. You'll have the opportunity to influence engineering best practices and play a key role in technical decision-making.

The Details

- Work Type: On-Site
- Work Hours: Day shift, 09:00–18:00 (1-hour lunch break), Monday to Friday.
- Management: This is an individual contributor role with no direct management responsibilities.
- Leave: 12 days annual leaves + 15 hours of personal leave per year.
- Education: Bachelor’s degree or above (no specific major required).
benefits:
- Full Salary Insurance Contribution: Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance paid on 100% of your official gross salary.
- Annual Bonuses: 13th-Month, 14th-Month Salary and KPIs Bonus
- Healthcare: Comprehensive Annual Health Check-up package provided by the company.
- Work Equipment: Provision of necessary computers, and modern office equipment required for your role.
- Team Building Budget: A dedicated quarterly budget for team meals or staff gatherings.
- Company Trip: An annual company vacation (local and/or international destinations).
- Special Occasion Gifts: Thoughtful gifts provided for major holidays (e.g., Tet, Mid-Autumn Festival, Christmas, etc.).

and exploratory testing ideas.● Leverage AI to analyze requirements, identify ambiguities, detect missing acceptance criteria, and uncover potential defects early.● Partner with development teams to document, prioritize, and track software defects using project management tools.● Work closely with developers to reproduce, investigate, and resolve issues efficiently.● Verify bug fixes and validate refinement, requirement reviews, and release activities.● Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) activities and validate business workflows.● Provide quality assessments and release recommendations.● technologies, and AI capabilities.

title: Senior QC (Automation Tester, QC)
jobDescription:
Kiểm soát chất lượng truyền thống và AI:

- Phân tích và review các đặc tả yêu cầu chức năng
- Lập kế hoạch kiểm thử cho các sản phẩm truyền thống và AI
- Thực hiện kiểm thử chức năng, UI/UX và hành vi của AI
- Kiểm tra các tình huống edge case, misuse và rủi ro nghiệp vụ
- Kiểm tra độ chính xác, độ tin cậy và tính công bằng của kết quả AI
- Theo dõi và báo cáo các lỗi một cách có hệ thống
- Tham gia các buổi demo và review luồng nghiệp vụ

​Kiểm thử tự động và công cụ AI:

- Phát triển các kịch bản kiểm thử tự động
- Áp dụng các công cụ kiểm thử AI (LLM evaluation, synthetic data)
- Thiết lập và duy trì hệ thống CI/CD cho kiểm thử
- Sử dụng công cụ giả lập người dùng để kiểm thử tự động
- Phát triển các công cụ nội bộ hỗ trợ kiểm thử AI

​Đảm bảo chất lượng dữ liệu cho AI:

- Kiểm tra tính đầy đủ và chính xác của dữ liệu huấn luyện AI
- Đánh giá tính đa dạng và cân bằng của dữ liệu
- Kiểm tra việc xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân và tuân thủ bảo mật
- Theo dõi hiệu suất mô hình AI theo thời gian

Học hỏi và phát triển:

- Nghiên cứu các xu hướng, công cụ và phương pháp kiểm thử AI mới
- Chủ động nâng cao tư duy kiểm thử manual + automation, tư duy phân tích rủi ro và tư duy end user
- Tham gia các khóa học và hoạt động nâng cao kỹ năng
- Chia sẻ kiến thức với đồng nghiệp
requirements:

- Chủ động, năng động, trách nhiệm cao, kiên định bám mục tiêu
- Có khả năng xử lý nhiều dự án song song, biết sắp xếp ưu tiên theo tiến độ công việc
- Có tư duy end-user, cẩn thận trong công việc
- Giao tiếp tốt, phối hợp hiệu quả với các team liên quan.
- Có khả năng phân tích các rủi ro hệ thống

Should-have:

- Nơi quy tụ nhân tài người Việt trên toàn cầu

jobDescription:
Chuyên viên cao cấp Kỹ thuật nền tảng (Platform Engineer) chịu trách nhiệm triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu hóa toàn bộ hệ sinh thái hạ tầng và nền tảng dùng chung của công ty. Ứng viên sẽ làm việc trên cả môi trường điện toán đám mây công cộng (GCP) và các trung tâm dữ liệu tại Việt Nam (Private Cloud) để đảm bảo tính ổn định và hiệu suất cao nhất cho hệ thống.

Job Purpose:

- Triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu toàn bộ nền tảng dùng chung của công ty thông qua việc:
- Quản lý và duy trì các hệ thống trên GCP và Data Center (Private Cloud).
- Vận hành các nền tảng kỹ thuật cốt lõi và hệ thống giám sát toàn diện.
- Tự động hóa quy trình phát triển và vận hành (CI/CD).
- Đảm bảo tính sẵn sàng và khả năng mở rộng của hạ tầng công nghệ.

Responsibilities

- Triển khai và vận hành toàn bộ nền tảng dùng chung trên nhiều môi trường (GCP, Private Cloud), bao gồm: Kong API Gateway, Hashicorp Vault, Temporal, Keycloak, Gitlab,...
- Triển khai và vận hành nền tảng giám sát toàn diện, bao gồm: Splunk, ELK, Grafana, Prometheus, Zabbix, New Relic.
- Thiết kế, triển khai và vận hành quy trình CI/CD và các công cụ tự động hoá để tối ưu hóa việc bàn giao sản phẩm.
- Nghiên cứu và áp dụng các giải pháp hạ tầng mới để nâng cao năng suất của đội ngũ phát triển phần mềm.
- Theo dõi hiệu năng hệ thống, xử lý các sự cố liên quan đến nền tảng và đưa ra các biện pháp tối ưu hóa tài nguyên.
requirements:
Trình độ học vấn & kinh nghiệm

- Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Kỹ thuật phần mềm hoặc các ngành liên quan.
- Tối thiểu 03 năm làm việc ở vị trí DevOps/SRE/System Platform hoặc tương đương.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế làm việc với các nền tảng cloud phổ biến (AWS, GCP, Azure).

Kiến thức & năng lực chuyên môn

- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành các công cụ dùng chung: Kong API Gateway, Hashicorp Vault, Keycloak, Temporal,...
- Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành các công cụ observability: Splunk, New Relic, Zabbix, Grafana Stack.
- Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong việc xây dựng và quản lý CI/CD pipeline.
- Có khả năng lập trình tốt với Python, Bash, hoặc Go để phục vụ công việc tự động hóa.
- Hiểu biết sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) và quản lý cấu hình.

Năng lực cá nhân

- Tư duy logic tốt, khả năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề phức tạp.
- Chủ động, ham học hỏi các công nghệ mới trong lĩnh vực Cloud và Platform Engineering.
- Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm và phối hợp tốt với các đội ngũ phát triển sản phẩm.
- Khả năng chịu áp lực cao trong môi trường vận hành hệ thống trọng yếu.
benefits:
Lương & Phụ cấp

- Lương tháng 13, thưởng hiệu quả công việc năm (theo kết quả kinh doanh của công ty).
- Phụ cấp ăn trưa: 730.000đ/tháng.
- Phép năm: Tối đa 15 ngày/năm (theo cấp nhân sự).
- Sức khỏe: Bảo hiểm xã hội, BH sức khỏe và khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm.
- Máy tính xách tay, màn hình và các phương tiện/tài khoản/công cụ cần thiết khác cho công việc.

Cơ hội nghề nghiệp

- Xét tăng lương hàng năm và cơ hội thăng tiến lên các vị trí quản lý kỹ thuật.
- Tiếp cận với các công nghệ hạ tầng hiện đại nhất trên thị trường.
- Công nhận và khen thưởng ở cấp độ nhóm và Công ty.

Môi trường làm việc

- Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động và văn hóa engineering mạnh mẽ.
- Teambuilding hàng quý/ hàng năm & các sự kiện nội bộ gắn kết.

title: Senior Golang Developer
jobDescription:
The Operation Platform team is responsible for centralizing and scaling all operational aspects of Zalopay, one of Vietnam’s leading financial platforms. Our mission is to build a unified, reliable, and extensible operation ecosystem that empowers operations teams to efficiently support millions of users, merchants and partners.

Within this platform, the Merchant Operation domain focuses on everything that happens after an online payment succeeds. This includes clearing and settlement, payouts, merchant wallets, payment request approvals, and operational tools that ensure funds move accurately, transparently, and on time.

We design systems that sit at the intersection of technology, finance, and operations, where correctness, traceability, and scalability are equally critical. By reusing common components and standardizing operational logic, we aim to make daily operational work simpler, safer, and more efficient.

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer (Golang) who enjoys building reliable backend systems in financial domains and understands the challenges of operating large-scale, data-heavy platforms.

ResponsibilitiesYou will:

- Design, build, and maintain backend systems for merchant operation domains, including:Clearing, settlement, and payout flowsMerchant wallet and balance managementPayment request approval and operational workflows
- Clearing, settlement, and payout flows
- Merchant wallet and balance management
- Payment request approval and operational workflows
- Build and evolve data-intensive services that handle large volumes of operational and financial data.
- Design reusable components and shared services to support multiple operational use cases across Zalopay.
- Ensure data correctness, idempotency, auditability, and consistency in post-payment workflows.
- Work with multiple storage and data systems, such as:Relational databases for transactional dataTiKV or similar distributed KV stores for high-throughput, low-latency use casesElasticsearch for search, investigation, and operational dashboards
- Relational databases for transactional data
- TiKV or similar distributed KV stores for high-throughput, low-latency use cases
- Elasticsearch for search, investigation, and operational dashboards
- Design batch and file-based integration flows using HDFS, FTP/SFTP, and scheduled jobs for reconciliation, settlement, and partner integrations.
- Improve system observability and traceability to support operations, reconciliation, and issue investigation.
- Collaborate closely with Product, Operations, Finance, and other Engineering teams to deliver end-to-end solutions.
- Debug and resolve complex production issues related to merchant operations and fund movement.
- Contribute to technical standards, code quality, and best practices within the Operation Platform team.
requirements:
You may be a good fit for this role if you:

- Hold a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
- Have at least 3 years of experience in backend software development.
- Have strong proficiency in Golang.
- Have solid experience in backend system design, including API design, data modeling, and service decomposition.
- Have strong knowledge of relational databases and SQL, including transactions, indexing, and performance tuning.
- Have hands-on experience with NoSQL or distributed data systems such as MongoDB or TiKV.
- Understand distributed system concepts such as idempotency, concurrency control, eventual consistency, and failure handling.
- Have experience using Redis or similar caching systems.
- Are comfortable working with large datasets, batch jobs, and file-based data exchanges (e.g. HDFS, FTP/SFTP).
- Have experience diagnosing and tracing production issues in large-scale systems.
- Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.

Nice to have:

- Experience in FinTech, payments, merchant platforms, or accounting-related systems.
- Hands-on experience with clearing, settlement, payout, reconciliation, or wallet systems.
- Experience building or maintaining operational tools, approval workflows, or investigation dashboards.
- Experience with Elasticsearch for searching, reporting, and operational analysis.
- Familiarity with event-driven architectures (Kafka or similar).
- Experience running systems in Kubernetes or cloud-native environments.
- Ability to work closely with non-technical stakeholders (Operations, Finance) and translate business workflows into technical solutions.
benefits: Established in 2017, Zalopay is a key member of VNG Corporation - Vietnam's technology champion. Driven by a mission to elevating all things money, we’ve become one of Vietnam’s leading payment platforms, making transactions seamless for everyone - every need, every time, everywhere, and everything. By the end of 2024, over 16 million users have trusted Zalopay, benefiting from a diverse ecosystem of 100+ services. We are also the only Vietnamese fintech recognized on CNBC’s Top 200 Global Fintech Companies. At Zalopay, we foster a dynamic workplace where talent drives impactful fintech innovations, empowering you to push limits and elevate your career. Join us and be part of something bigger!

title: System Administrator (OS, Virtualization, Databases)
reasons:
- Top 3 biggest Retailer in Vietnam
- Attractive compensation & benefit package
- Challenging projects with awesome co-workers
jobDescription:
Position Summary:

The System Administrator are responsible for the secure and effective operation of all hardware and software that is used within a wide range of CRV oversees variate system, enable the delivery of a high-quality service to end users and processes are in place to meet business needs. This position is a stakeholder-facing role and requires that you establish and manage expectations within the business and drive the IT team to achieve those expectations to a high standard.

Key Duties & Responsibilities (but not limited to)

- Provide technical guidance to IT support staff, ensuring knowledge transfer and skill development.
- Managed and hand on the large-scale system: UNIX/Linux, Windows, Server, Storage, Virtualization, Open-Source software, Monitoring, Cloud Services, and backup software.
- Implementing and managing backup/Restore/DRP procedures.
- To implement quality processes within IT to ensure that the processes are properly adapted and implemented within the IT operational teams.
- Research and evaluate new technologies, tools and methodologies that can improve the efficiency and effectiveness of the engineering processes and products.
- Owner of the Incident, Request, Change and Escalation processes, ensuring high levels of performance in these processes, accurate reporting and establishing service improvement activities when required.
- Communicate effectively with internal and external stakeholders, presenting technical information in a clear and concise manner.
- Monitor, control, and support service delivery, ensuring systems, methodologies and procedures are in place and followed.
- Be accountable for the Quality of Service and performance; ensuring future demand from growth and projects is understood and factored into capacity plans for all associated systems.
- Contribute to the continuous improvement of the engineering culture, processes, and practices.
- Report to the Infrastructure and Platform Supervisor to provide regular updates on the status and progress of the system projects and initiatives.
requirements:
Qualifications/ Memberships:

- 3+ years previous Managed Big Scale system in variate platform: Linux/Open-Source/Windows.
- Proven capacity to work under stress and to adapt quickly in a rapidly changing environment

Experience:

- Knowledge on Hardware: server and storage (Dell, HPE, IBM)
- Knowledge on Operating System: Windows, Ubuntu, SUSE Enterprise Linux,…
- Knowledge on Virtualizations: VMWare, Hyper-V, …
- Knowledge on Database: MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, …
- Knowledge on Web Services: NGINX, Apache, IIS, …
- Knowledge on ITIL process.

Personal Requirements

- Belief that outstanding customer service is the key to success.
- Self-motivation.
- Develop effective working relationships.
- Positive attitude and takes responsibility for their own actions.
- Willingness to undertake personal and professional development.
- Willingness to attend corporate events outside of normal working hours.
benefits:
Central Retail in Vietnam is one of the largest multi-format foreign retailers in Vietnam, operating across Food, Non-Food, Property, and E-commerce businesses. Our portfolio includes well-known brands such as GO!, Lan Chi Mart, SuperSports, Kubo, and many others.

With a nationwide presence, we are committed to contributing to Vietnam's prosperity and enhancing the quality of life of the people. Guided by our purpose of being "Central to Life", we continuously invest in innovation, digital transformation, and sustainable growth to make our customers' lives easier and create long-term value for our communities, partners, and employees.

Join us and be part of a dynamic, fast-growing organization where your ideas, passion, and talents can help shape the future of retail in Vietnam.

- Attractive salary (you’ll love it)
- Phone & Meal allowances
- 15 annual leaves
- 24/24 Personal Accident insurance for yourself & health insurance for yourself and your spouse & children.
- Performance review 1 time/ year
- Open, transparent and trustworthy environment
- Challenging projects with awesome co-workers
- Personalize training plan and career development

title: Technical Leader (PHP/ReactJS)
reasons:
- Empowerment to create your impact.
- Global team, strong foundation, endless growth.
- Friendly culture, supportive colleagues.
jobDescription:
- Lead the overall technical direction, architecture, and engineering execution across backend, frontend, mobile, and infrastructure to ensure scalable, secure, maintainable, and high-performance product delivery.
- Drive backend development with PHP/Laravel, while providing technical guidance for ReactJS / NextJS / React Native to ensure alignment with the overall system architecture.
- Design and review application architecture, RESTful APIs, database structures, caching strategies, and infrastructure solutions with a focus on scalability, security, performance, and long-term maintainability.
- Define and enforce engineering standards, coding guidelines, design principles, testing practices, documentation, and deployment processes across development teams.
- Oversee cloud infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, logging, release management, and production environments to ensure system availability, operational efficiency, and security.
- Manage and optimize services on AWS, Cloudflare, Docker, and support incident response, root cause analysis, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement of production systems.
- Identify technical risks, evaluate technologies and architectural approaches, and drive technical decisions aligned with product and business goals.
- Mentor and support Frontend / Backend Coordinators through technical discussions, architecture guidance, code reviews, and knowledge sharing.
- Support technical estimation, planning, prioritization, execution monitoring, and release management to ensure delivery quality and timely completion.
- Collaborate closely with Product Manager, QA, Operations, infrastructure teams, and other stakeholders to resolve cross-team dependencies and deliver stable, effective solutions.
- Participate in technical interviews, onboarding, and the development of engineering talent.
requirements:
- 10+ years of software development experience, including strong expertise in PHP/Laravel.
- At least 3 years of experience as a Tech Lead / Technical Leader or similar role.
- Strong understanding of OOP, SOLID, Design Patterns, and Clean Architecture.
- Proven experience in scalable system architecture, API design, database design, caching, infrastructure design, and performance optimization.
- Strong experience with MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, and Memcached.
- Hands-on experience with ReactJS / NextJS / React Native.
- Practical knowledge of AWS, Cloudflare, Docker, CI/CD, deployment, monitoring, logging, and cloud infrastructure.
- Good understanding of secure coding practices, OWASP, API security, access control, and cloud security.
- Experience leading cross-functional engineering teams across backend, frontend, and infrastructure.
- Strong leadership, mentoring, communication, problem-solving, and stakeholder management skills.
- Good English communication skills for technical discussions and documentation.
benefits:

- 24 paid day-offs (effective from probation period)

- Premium Health Insurance package
- Annual health check at international hospital
- Company trip & Occasional gifts

- Yearly Position Level Assessments

title: R&D Core Technology Engineer
jobDescription:
Piontech Software đang tìm kiếm một R&D Core Technology Engineer phụ trách nghiên cứu và phát triển các công nghệ lõi phục vụ hệ sinh thái ứng dụng Android của công ty.

Vị trí này tập trung vào các mảng công nghệ như camera realtime, filter, AR camera, computer vision, xử lý ảnh/video, AI on-device và tối ưu hiệu năng trên thiết bị di động.

Ứng viên sẽ không phụ trách phát triển toàn bộ app Android, mà sẽ tập trung xây dựng các prototype, SDK, native module hoặc core library để đội ngũ Android Kotlin tích hợp vào nhiều sản phẩm khác nhau.

● Nghiên cứu và phát triển các công nghệ lõi cho ứng dụng Android trong các mảng:

○ Camera realtime

○ Filter camera

○ AR camera effect

○ Face detection / face landmark

○ Background segmentation

○ Object tracking

○ Pose / hand tracking

○ Motion detection

○ Image processing / video processing

○ AI model chạy trực tiếp trên thiết bị di động

○ FPS

○ RAM/CPU/GPU usage

○ Battery usage

○ Độ nóng thiết bị

○ Crash rate

● Đề xuất các công nghệ mới có khả năng ứng dụng vào sản phẩm, đặc biệt trong các dòng app camera, filter, AR, AI camera, scanner, motion game và các sản phẩm Android có tương tác với phần cứng thiết bị.

title: AI Engineer (Agentic Systems & Backend)
reasons:
- Full Social Insurance, Premium Insurance
- Budget For Learning & Training Course
- Flexible working time, Full salary in probation
jobDescription:
AI Engineering & Orchestration:

- Agentic Systems: Design and deploy autonomous AI Agents, building complex workflows including planning, multi-step reasoning, and tool-use/function calling.
- Data & Retrieval: Build and optimize RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems using vector databases and embeddings to provide accurate context for LLMs.
- AIOps: Establish evaluation pipelines to measure AI quality, minimize hallucinations, and control bias.
- Resource Optimization: Monitor and optimize latency, token throughput, and operational costs for AI systems.
- AI Integration: Package AI features into stable APIs for seamless integration into the existing Microservices ecosystem.

Backend Engineering:

- Core Systems: Design, develop, and manage high-performance backend services, ensuring stability and scalability in production.
- Feature Development: Maintain existing systems and proactively develop new functionalities based on business requirements.
- International Collaboration: Work closely with the Korean tech team and stakeholders to align on architectural solutions and application deployment.
- Code Quality: Apply standard coding practices, ensuring high unit test coverage and optimized debugging processes.
- Technology Research: Proactively research new technologies, specifically AI infrastructure solutions, to apply to company projects.
requirements:
Mandatory Skills:

- Experience: 4–6 years of professional experience, including 1–2 years in backend software development and 3–4 years in AI Engineering. Strong proficiency in Python or Java is required. Candidates with hands-on experience in both languages are preferred, using Python for AI/Data applications and Java for core backend services.
- Architecture: Deep understanding of Microservices, RESTful APIs, and gRPC.
- Data: Experience with SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) or NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra).
- Fundamentals: Mastery of data structures, algorithms, OOP, and common design patterns.

AI Specialization:

- LLM Production: Proven experience implementing features using OpenAI, Claude, or open-source models (Llama, Mistral) in production.
- Frameworks: Proficiency in AI orchestration libraries: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen.
- Vector Infrastructure: Experience with Vector Databases such as Milvus, Pinecone, Qdrant, or pgvector.
- Agentic Skills: Solid understanding of Function Calling, Memory management (Long-term/Short-term), and advanced Prompt Engineering (Chain-of-Thought, ReAct).
- AI Quality: Knowledge of evaluation frameworks (e.g., Ragas, Arize Phoenix, or LangSmith).

Nice-to-have:

- Experience with high-traffic systems and asynchronous processing.
- Proficiency in Docker, Kubernetes, and Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
- Experience with Redis (Caching) and Message Brokers (Kafka or RabbitMQ).
- Understanding of CI/CD for AI (MLOps).

company: Panasonic Vietnam Group – Panasonic R&D Center Vietnam (PRDCV)
reasons:

jobDescription:
We are seeking a highly motivated Product Owner with solid experience in IT solution development. In this role, you will bridge the gap between business stakeholders and the engineering team, ensuring that digital transformation solutions (enterprise applications, fintech, ERP, or SaaS platforms) are well-defined, prioritized, and successfully delivered. You will be responsible for shaping the product vision, translating requirements into actionable user stories, and driving the product lifecycle from ideation to release

• Work with stakeholders to gather business requirements, understand customer needs, and transform them into product features and specifications.• Conduct market and competitor analysis to identify opportunities for product innovation in IT solutions.• Define and maintain the product roadmap and ensure alignment with company strategy and client objectives.• Manage and prioritize the product backlog, ensuring requirements are clear, feasible, and aligned with business goals.• Write detailed user stories and acceptance criteria to guide development teams.• Collaborate with engineering, design, QA, and operations teams to deliver high-quality IT solutions (e.g., ERP, payment systems, integration platforms).• Lead and facilitate Agile ceremonies: sprint planning, backlog grooming, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.• Monitor and analyze product performance metrics (adoption, retention, ROI) and recommend improvements.• Support solution deployment, training, and documentation for end users and partners.• Act as the voice of the client during product discussions, ensuring solutions deliver tangible business value.
requirements:
1. Must have

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Business, or related fields.

• 5+ years of experience as Product Owner / Business Analyst / IT Solution Consultant.

• Strong background in enterprise IT solutions, such as ERP, CRM, fintech platforms, or SaaS applications.

• Proven experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies.

• Hands-on experience with JIRA, Confluence, Figma, Miro, or similar tools.

• Strong ability to translate business requirements into technical deliverables.

• Excellent problem-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.

• Fluent in English and Vietnamese (both written and verbal).

2. Nice to have

• Product Owner or Scrum Master certification (CSPO, PSM).

• Experience in system integration projects (APIs, cloud platforms, enterprise middleware).

• Familiarity with data analytics tools (Google Analytics, Mixpanel, PowerBI).

• Experience in fintech, banking, or e-commerce environments.

• Strong understanding of MVP mindset, prioritization, and iterative product delivery.

title: Product Frontend Intern
reasons:
- Technical experts of all fields
- Challenging experience to learn and grow strong

jobDescription:
As a Product Frontend Intern of Geek Internship Autumn 2026, you will be an integral part of a real team working collaboratively to build a real product from its initial stages. This team will be coached and supported by a Senior team member throughout the entire process.

This is a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience across the full spectrum of product development, from understanding the business problem and user needs to designing and developing engaging user interfaces. This program is particularly suitable for individuals aspiring to become Software Engineers in the future.

Scope of Work:

I. Understanding the Business Context & Product Requirements:

- Business Context: Participate in discussions with stakeholders to understand the product's goals, target audience, and business objectives.
- Technical Requirements Analysis: Collaborate with other technical team members to clarify and analyze the technical requirements of the product.
- Technology Research: Research and evaluate suitable frontend technologies, frameworks, and tools to address the product requirements.

II. Frontend Development & Implementation:

- Develop User Interfaces: Build and maintain user interfaces for web applications, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience.
- Implement Designs: Translate UI/UX designs and wireframes into clean, efficient, and reusable code.
- Optimize Performance: Optimize frontend code for maximum speed, scalability, and cross-browser compatibility.
- Version Control: Utilize version control systems (e.g., Git) for code management and collaboration.
- Testing: Participate in testing and debugging frontend components to ensure quality and stability.
- Learn Frontend Technologies: Keep up-to-date with the latest frontend technologies, frameworks, and best practices.

III. Collaboration:

- Cross-Functional Collaboration: Work closely with team member to ensure seamless integration and a cohesive product.
- Communicate Effectively: Clearly communicate technical ideas and progress updates to both technical and non-technical team members.
- Seek and Incorporate Feedback: Actively solicit and incorporate feedback from designers, backend engineers, and mentors.
- Maintain Documentation: Assist in creating and maintaining frontend-related documentation.
requirements:
- Currently enrolled in a Bachelor's or Master's program in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Web Development, or a related technical field.
- Aspiring to become a Software Engineer in the future.
- A portfolio or demonstration of your frontend development skills and projects (personal projects, school assignments, or contributions to open-source are welcome). This could include links to websites or GitHub repositories.
- Good problem-solving and analytical skills.
- Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
- Eagerness to learn new technologies and receive constructive feedback.
- A proactive and detail-oriented approach to development.
- Availability to commit full-time to the duration of the Geek Internship Autumn 2026 program (17/08/2026 - 23/10/2026).
benefits:
Learning Opportunities & Beneficials:

Throughout this internship, you will gain practical experience in:

- Understanding how frontend development contributes to solving real-world business problems.
- Collaborating with the product development team to translate user needs into interactive and engaging user interfaces.
- Developing proficiency in core frontend technologies and modern frameworks.
- Learning to build responsive and accessible web applications that work across different devices and browsers.
- Gaining experience with frontend performance optimization techniques.
- Collaborating within a full product development team.
- Receiving mentorship and guidance from experienced frontend engineers.
- Gaining hands-on experience with Agile methodologies and tools.
- Developing professional skills through dedicated workshops.
- Networking and learning from 20 fellow interns.
- Connecting with seasoned experts in frontend development.
- Receiving internship allowance and enjoying GEEK Hub benefits.
- Becoming part of the vibrant Geekaholic community.
- Potential opportunity for a full-time Frontend Engineer role at GEEK Up.

title: Senior Software Engineer (Windows Platform)
reasons:
- Dynamic and supportive working environment
- Opportunities to work on high-complexity technical
- High ownership, real impact.
jobDescription:
About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Platform Engineering team and help build secure, scalable, and maintainable Windows applications, SDKs, and platform components.

This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy working on system-level challenges, application architecture, security-related features, and reusable platform foundations. You will work closely with our Apple Platform, Backend, and Security teams to design and deliver solutions used across multiple products.

We value engineers who can learn quickly, adapt to new technologies, and take ownership of technical challenges.

What You Will Do

Platform & Application Development

- Design and develop Windows desktop applications.
- Build reusable platform modules, shared libraries, and SDKs.
- Contribute to application architecture and engineering standards.
- Develop maintainable and scalable software using modern development practices.

Security & Identity

- Work on authentication, device identity, certificate-based trust, and secure communication workflows.
- Integrate Windows security capabilities and platform APIs.
- Collaborate with security engineers to implement secure-by-design solutions.

Platform Engineering

- Participate in building shared platform foundations used across multiple products.
- Improve developer experience through reusable frameworks, tooling, and automation.
- Contribute to CI/CD pipelines and release processes.

Collaboration

- Work closely with Product, Backend, Security, and Apple Platform teams.
- Participate in technical discussions, code reviews, and architecture reviews.
- Mentor junior engineers and contribute to engineering best practices.
requirements:
Required

- 5+ years of professional software development experience.
- Strong experience developing Windows desktop applications.
- Good knowledge of C#, .NET, and modern application architecture principles.
- Experience with multithreading, asynchronous programming, and debugging.
- Understanding of networking fundamentals and client-server applications.
- Experience with source control systems such as Git.
- Strong problem-solving skills and ownership mindset.
- Ability to learn new technologies and domains quickly.

Nice to Have

- Experience with WPF, WinUI, MAUI, or desktop UI frameworks.
- Experience building reusable libraries, SDKs, or shared components.
- Experience with authentication, security, certificates, or identity systems.
- Experience working on endpoint security, device management, or enterprise software.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and automation tools.
- Experience collaborating in cross-platform environments (Windows, macOS, iOS).
benefits:
What Success Looks Like

Within your first few months, you will:

- Understand our platform architecture and engineering standards.
- Contribute to core platform modules and shared components.
- Participate in security-related feature development.
- Help improve maintainability and scalability across products.
- Collaborate effectively with platform teams across different operating systems.

Why Join Us?

- Opportunity to work on platform engineering and security-focused products.
- High ownership and technical impact.
- Modern engineering practices and collaborative culture.
- Opportunity to build reusable foundations that power multiple products.
- Work alongside engineers building solutions across Windows, macOS, iOS, and backend platforms.

title: AI Engineer (LLM, Agents)
reasons:
- AI-first company shaping the future of fitness
- Join a passionate global team across VN, US, & UK
- Collaborative team valuing joy & creativity
jobDescription:
Position Overview:

Our Vietnam team is the engineering engine behind Everfit. Today, we're a team of around 170 people, approximately 150 in Da Nang and 20 in Hanoi - who have built a product that has become a category leader in just five years.

Now we're entering our next chapter: becoming an AI-first company with a human core. We're building intelligent systems that understand context, anticipate needs, and take action-amplifying what coaches can do, not replacing them. AI isn't just another feature at Everfit; it's becoming the foundation of how we build products, collaborate as a team, and shape the future of coaching.

As an AI Engineer, you'll help build:

- A multi-agent AI system ("Olly" as J.A.R.V.I.S.) that understands training, nutrition, communication, and coaching intelligence.
- A new interaction model for software, moving beyond dashboards to natural, conversational experiences.
- A global AI-powered wellness marketplace connecting millions of coaches and clients around the world.

If you're passionate about AI, human potential, and creating technology that genuinely empowers people, you'll have the opportunity to solve challenging engineering problems, work with the latest AI technologies, and help redefine how humans and AI work together-not just what AI can do.

If you're looking to build technology that changes how the world moves, trains, and grows, Everfit is where you'll do some of your best work.

Your impact:

AI Strategy and Roadmap Execution

- Collaborate with the AI team to understand the company’s AI strategy and roadmap.
- Provide frameworks and conduct research to support the execution of AI projects.
- Implement best practices for prompt engineering, evals, and continuous improvement of LLM-based features.
- Identify opportunities for innovation and improvement within Everfit’s AI projects.

LLM Workflow and Agentic System Development

- Design, develop, and deploy LLM workflows, RAG pipelines, and agentic systems across Everfit’s AI surface - coaching, programming, voice, vision, and nutrition features.
- Leverage frontier LLMs from OpenAI and Anthropic, applying them to real product features used by coaches and clients every day.
- Build evaluation infrastructure - test sets, metrics, LLM-as-judge - to catch regressions before they reach users.
- Build LLM observability - token cost, latency, failure modes, hallucination signals.
- Implement guardrails for health-adjacent outputs - refusal logic, tone enforcement, factual grounding.
- Collect and analyze user feedback to identify and prioritize areas for continuous improvement.
- Generate reports and dashboards to track key AI quality, cost, and adoption metrics for stakeholders.

Cross-functional Collaboration

- Work directly with BAs and QAs to define “done” for non-deterministic AI features, translating AI uncertainty into acceptance criteria QA can verify.
- Collaborate with product managers, software engineers, designers, and QAs to ensure smooth end-to-end delivery of AI solutions.
- Support Everfit’s initiatives.

Data Infrastructure and Insights

- Design data pipelines that feed prompts, RAG, and evals from real coach and client behavior.
- Drive actionable insights and recommendations based on usage data.
- Contribute to the AI Credits architecture - metering, cost control, graceful degradation.

AI System Maintenance and Improvement

- Maintain and improve existing AI systems to ensure optimal performance, accuracy, and cost.
- Run root-cause analyses on production regressions and quality gaps.
- Enhance the accuracy of health and fitness AI features through continuous eval-driven iteration.
requirements:
We’re open Junior → Senior - we calibrate on capability and judgment, not years.

Junior candidates should expect to ramp fast on what they haven’t seen yet;

Senior candidates will own features end-to-end and influence team standards from week one.

- You’ve shipped at least one LLM feature to real users - at work or in open-source. Scale doesn’t matter; learning from a shipped feature does. Side-project demos that no one used don’t count.
- Proficiency in Python (we use FastAPI as the primary AI codebase).
- Hands-on experience with LLM workflows, prompts, RAG, embeddings, and structured output - chunking choices, retrieval quality, JSON / function calling, validation, retry on malformed output.
- Direct experience calling LLM SDKs from OpenAI and/or Anthropic - not only through a framework wrapper. Streaming, tool use, structured output, retries.
- Familiar with agentic systems - and the bounds an agent loop needs to fail closed (max steps, budget cap, wall-clock cap, defined fallback).
- Eval-first mindset - you ask “how will we measure this?” before writing the code.
- Strong understanding of data processing and analysis techniques, particularly in handling health and fitness data.
- Comfortable communicating in English (discussing ideas & solutions with PO) and fluent in Vietnamese.

[Nice to have]

- Direct experience with our stack - LangGraph, Qdrant, Trustcall, BAML, Langfuse, MCP, n8n.
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Google Cloud, Azure).
- Background in health informatics, wearable technology, or personalized fitness programs.
- Contributions to open-source AI projects or publications in AI research.
- Experience with the wellness or fitness space.
- Familiarity with AI coding tools - Claude Code, Cursor, GitHub Copilot.
- Quantified LLM cost or latency reduction with a number attached.
benefits:
Compensation & Benefits:

- Full social insurance coverage and premium healthcare benefits.
- Competitive salary with 13th-month pay and performance bonus.
- Paid leave — vacation, sick leave, and maternity leave

Build Your Career with Impact:

- Be part of a mission-driven company that’s transforming human potential.
- Empower over 300,000+ coaches in more than 200 countries - including Olympic athletes, military trainers, rehab specialists, and celebrity coaches.
- Make a global impact while building a meaningful, purpose-driven career.
- Continuous training, mentoring.
- 1-2 performance reviews annually.

Work Environment:

- English-speaking, international environment promoting open communication and collaboration.
- Work alongside world-class talent from companies like Apple, Meta, Uber, Patreon, and Nike, united by a shared passion for impact and excellence.
- International team for global career growth.
- State-of-the-art equipment provided.
- Beautiful working environment near Danang's city center (Dragon Bridge) and Hanoi office.

Health & Wellness:

- PVI health insurance program and annual health check-ups.
- Active sports clubs (football, badminton, pickleball) and company retreats.
- A modern pantry designed for relaxation and social connection.
- Monthly wellness and learning workshops to recharge and grow.

title: AI/ML Engineer
reasons:
- Disruptive innovations
- People-oriented philosophy of doing business
- Your footprint on regional on-demand market
jobDescription:
- Build and operate production-grade machine learning systems end-to-end, including data ingestion, feature pipelines, training workflows, model serving, monitoring, retraining, and rollback.
- Develop services, APIs, batch jobs, or real-time integrations that allow ML models to be used in product and operational workflows.
- Work with Data Scientists and Data Engineers to productionize models, features, evaluation pipelines, and monitoring logic.
- Build reliable ML infrastructure with strong focus on scalability, latency, observability, maintainability, and safe deployment.
- Monitor production models for data drift, train/serve skew, prediction shifts, performance degradation, and system failures.
- Contribute to model improvement through feature design, error analysis, evaluation, and production feedback.
requirements:
- Strong software engineering skills, especially in Python, with experience building backend services, data pipelines, or production systems.
- Good understanding of machine learning fundamentals, including supervised learning, feature engineering, model evaluation, and deployment.
- Strong SQL skills and ability to work with large-scale datasets.
- Experience with APIs, batch processing, streaming, workflow orchestration, CI/CD, monitoring, or cloud infrastructure.
- Ability to debug issues across data, model, and system layers.
- Comfortable working with Data Scientists, Backend Engineers, Product, and business teams to ship ML-powered features.
- Willingness to go beyond pure engineering implementation and participate in data analysis, model evaluation, and business problem framing.

Nice to have

- Experience with MLOps platforms, feature stores, model registries, experiment tracking, data quality checks, or model monitoring tools.
- Experience with real-time prediction, ranking, pricing, fraud/risk, recommendation, dispatching, optimization, or marketplace systems.
- Familiarity with A/B testing, backtesting, online evaluation, retraining pipelines, and business KPI measurement.
- Experience with Kubernetes, Airflow, Kafka, Spark, BigQuery, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, or similar technologies.
- Ability to read technical papers or references and turn them into practical production solutions.
benefits:
